items.text:
CALLING ALL FILM DIRECTORS, PRODUCERS, ACTORS & SCREENWRITERS! 

Use the DISCOUNT code 
manc30 for 30% off our Manchester Global short film festival! If you have a short that’s under 30mins long, we’d love to see it.

This festival is not just about showcasing films but also creating a space for the future of cinema. We aim to help bloom the next generation of artists. 

Hosted at the Cultplex Cinema on the 17th October, we hope to create an intimate and personable experience for filmmakers new and old. If you or anyone you know has a film you’d like to share, follow the link below and submit today! 

https://filmfreeway.com/ManchesterInternational?utm_source=ig&utm_medium=social&utm_content=link_in_bio&fbclid=PAdGRleARS8TRleHRuA2FlbQIxMQBzcnRjBmFwcF9pZA8xMjQwMjQ1NzQyODc0MTQAAadQEcZ3PXs4_Nl7YTNrJrZEzbdZxpDHJwkhTnjy1AePffVEhJO1JPjYDnCDCA_aem_54w6tYhxxa0CUhyigp4BCA&utm_id=97760_v0_s00_e0_tv3_a1denni5ey3o21

items.previewDescription: Attempting to act one of Shakespeare’s plays can be one of the most challenging and rewarding experiences of any actors life. Join acclaimed director OWEN HORSLEY - Associate Artist of the Royal Shakespeare Company - and become part of his company of actors for a three-day immersion in the bloody ...

**MALE GYMNAST NEEDED to play a body double Location   (LONDON)**

@everyone We're urgently looking for **experienced gymnasts** for an exciting upcoming production in **London**.

This is a **fantastic opportunity to be part of an amazing production** and is a **paid role**.

**Important:** Applicants must be between **5'7" and 5'10"** as this role is for a **body/ stand in  double for a well -known artist **.

Please share with anyone suitable in your network.

If interested, please send your details, recent photos, height, and any relevant gymnastics or stunt experience.

We'd love to hear from you! 🎬🤸‍♀️🤸‍♂️#**gymnasts #castingcall #marksummerscasting #marksummers #castingcall **#ukcasting

**Looking for an iPhone Camera Operator**

Need someone for a one day shoot this Saturday (4 hours).

You'll be filming TikTok style content using:
* iPhone 17 Pro
* DJI wireless microphones
* Portable LED light

Equipment is provided. Just need an operator who knows how to move quickly, capture clean social content, and work comfortably with an iPhone setup.

Paid gig.

If interested, DM:
* Your experience shooting social content
* A few examples of your work

Location: Pasadena, CA
Date: Saturday
Duration: 4 hours

items.text:
Hejka!
Do 5-minutowej etiudy studenckiej na potrzeby Warszawskiej Szkoły Filmowej o charakterze fabularnym szukam:

• osoby od oświetlenia/gaffera

Termin: 

13-14 czerwca 2026, planowany start: 8:00, zakończenie wieczorem, ewentualny dzień dodatkowy na dogrywki, poprawki

Miejsce: 

Mieszkanie na Pradze Południe, 5 min. pieszo od Ronda Wiatraczna (nieduże, bo około 30m, ale moje, więc będzie luzik) 

Krótki opis filmu: Gdy Zosia – dorosła kobieta żyjąca w dziecięcym świecie fantazji zostaje sama po odejściu swojego partnera w ucieczce od rzeczywistości, musi stawić czoła prawdzie o dorosłości, ryzykując rozpad jedynego świata, w którym potrafi funkcjonować.

Tematami przewodnimi filmu są przede wszystkim: ucieczka od rzeczywistości oraz kruchość życia w iluzji. Film również naznacza tematykę samotności i współzależności, izolacji emocjonalnej i utraty niewinności. 

Oferta non-profit, wymiana doświadczeniami i kontaktem 🙂 

Jeśli jesteś osobą, która czuje estetykę z poniższych zdjęć, zapraszam do współpracy! Oferuję super towarzystwo, jedzonko i przyjemnie spędzony czas. 

Dzięki! <3

items.text:
Hej! Nazywam się Zlata, mam 19 lat.
Buduję swoje portfolio modelki i chętnie nawiążę współpracę przy sesjach TFP w #Warszawie.Mam doświadczenie w sesjach zdjęciowych oraz pozowaniu dla artystów.

Interesują mnie portrety, fashion, sesje artystyczne i konceptualne, współpraca z projektantami oraz tworzenie referencji dla artystów i ilustratorów.

Nie interesują mnie sesje erotyczne ani nagość.

Zapraszam do kontaktu w wiadomości prywatnej 📩

items.text:
## KRAKOWSKA GRUPA FILMOWA POSZUKUJE EKIPY // NON-PROFIT

🎬 Zdjęcia: 7–9.08.2026

📍 Lokacja zdjęć: Orzechówka, okolice Suchedniowa (ok. 35 km od Kielc)

Cześć! Jesteśmy niezależną ekipą filmową z Krakowa. W sierpniu realizujemy krótkometrażowy film psychologiczny z elementami thrillera.

Poszukujemy członków ekipy, najlepiej z własnym sprzętem lub dostępem do niego:
* DOP/OPERATOR KAMERY
* REALIZATOR DŹWIĘKU

Ze względu na lokalizację planu dużym atutem będzie prawo jazdy! 🚗

**Logline**: Młoda dziewczyna przeżywa zapętlone wydarzenie, w którym gra ze znajomymi w grę towarzyską. W końcu orientuje się, że umiera, a to co widzi, to jej ostatnie wspomnienie, którego kurczowo próbuje się trzymać, by pozostać przy życiu.

Chętnych prosimy o kontakt w wiadomości prywatnej wraz z krótką informacją o sobie i swoim doświadczeniu.

items.text:
🚨 SEEKING PRODUCTION COMPANY / PRODUCING PARTNER FOR FEATURE FILM 🚨

I’m looking to connect with a serious production company, producer, or investor-aligned film team for my completed feature screenplay, **FIRST CONTACT**.

**Logline:**
A Connecticut construction foreman begins witnessing unexplained aerial phenomena no one else can see—until he becomes the unlikely bridge to humanity’s first peaceful contact with an extraterrestrial intelligence.

This is a **character-driven sci-fi feature** with:
🎬 completed screenplay
📘 pitch deck
📄 one-sheet / project snapshot
✨ franchise potential

Early Actor Attachments: 

Jeffrey Alan Solomon 

Emery Smith Gaia Television Host of "Cosmic Disclosure"

I’m Connecticut-based and looking for the right producing path for this project. If you are a producer, production company, or industry professional aligned with original independent features, I’d love to connect.

Please EMAIL me directly if interested or if you know someone I should reach out to. Please title subject line: FIRST CONTACT

Thank you 🙏
**Glenn E. Mate Sr.**

**Email: glennmatesr@gmail.com**

items.text:
DOCUMENTARY CASTING!

Casting a doc about deepfakes. It's aimed to focus on human impact-the trauma, confusion, and how people are coping or pushing back.

Who I’m looking for:

-Young people whose faces were used in deepfake videos, school bullying, or revenge

-influencers or content creators who have had their likeness misused 

-anyone hit by deepfake scams

-survivors who are speaking out or rebuilding 

-activists or anyone fighting against this, organizations aimed to combat or raise awareness or offer support of any kind

Stolenfacesdoc@gmail.com if you think you’re a fit- email me a little bit about yourself and your story and lets chat!  

Interviews are Paid, one hour long, and will shoot 7/22-24 in Los Angeles (flexible scheduling) No travel budget, LA locals only 

Thank you!

items.text:
CREW CALL

Hello everyone! Valerie Ibarra here! I’m still looking to fill several positions for my upcoming faith based film, ‘Discernment’. 

Although I would love to pay everyone (each of you are definitely worth the pay), unfortunately, this will all be volunteer. I’m aware that asking anyone to commit is a lot to ask, however, it’s difficult to find people at the very last minute. So if you’re willing to not only volunteer but also commit, please send in your submission along with a resume. Or if you happen to know anyone looking to gain the experience, please send them our way. We would love to have ALL positions filled by end of June. I truly appreciate everyone in advance. Details of the project are as follows: 

CREW CALL-DISCERNMENT

TITLE: Discernment, Feature film 

PAY: Unpaid (All roles volunteer), IMDb credit, Food/snacks/refreshments 

NOTES: Faith based, comical, drama, emotional, 

CREW:
2 – PA’S
1 – Sound/Boom operator
1 – Grip

DATES: August 20-23, August 28-29 

LOCATION(S):  Seattle/Tacoma (Exact Location TBD)

ALTERNATE DATE: September 4-6, 2026

USAGE: Film Festivals, Web, possible streaming platforms

UNION: Non-Union

COMPANY: IbaRuba Productions

PRODUCER/DIRECTOR: Valerie Ibarra

SUBMISSION: 
Initial: Email a resume to ibarubaproductions@gmail.com  
Subject Line: 
Attn. Discernment Crew Call

Additional Notes: NDA is required prior to receiving entire script

topComments.text: Try your family and friends. Are you paying for equipment. Then pay for your crew & talent.

items.text:
Join the Cape Crusaders Team! 🦸🦹👸
We’re looking for talented performers to bring superheroes and princesses to life at parties and events. Costumes provided. Experience preferred, driving a plus.
Good rates of pay.
Interested? DM us or call 07535 822338!

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of Superman and text that says 'JOIN CRUSADERSTEAM! JOINTHE THE スパサ CAPED CRUSADERS TEAM! ŠUPERHEROES & PRINCESSES WANTED! Ready to bring magic and adventure to parties, festivals, events & weddings? We need energetic performers! Based across London, Essex & surrounding areas We travel nationwide for jobs! Applicants MUST be able to DRIVE! Dancers & singers are a BIG advantage! Call 07535 822338 or DM us to apply NOW! Make every event epic with Caped Crusaders Parties! Caped Crusaders Parties- Superheroes & Princesses for Hire!'

items.text:
Denne køkkenurt kan forvandle dit helbred! Opdag hvorfor oregano er det naturlige middel, din krop har længtes efter.
 Opskrifter, skjulte fordele og hvordan du bruger det korrekt.
 Klik på den første kommentar, og begynd at hele hjemmefra.
items.title: Oregano: Naturens mest kraftfulde urt og dens sundhedsmæssige fordele – Serpin Recipes

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'VIDSTE DU DET? Oregano Lindrer bronkitis astma, kurerer akne og bumser, FORDELE bekaemper angst og sovnloshed, forebygger VED hovedpine, gigt- og muskelsmerter, hjaelper med fordojelsesbesvaer, opkastning og diarré, reducerer TURL kolesterol, indeholder fibre, mineraler, hjaelper med at regulere forhojet blodtryk, forebygger Parkinsons og kraeft. MO Fra mine gamle midler OPSKRIFT I DEN FORSTE KOMMENTAR GIV MIG EN HEJ ELLER TAK FOR AT VIDE, AT DU LASTE MIG'

items.text: Hvorfor spise gelatine til aftensmad? Det er fyldt med kollagen, forbedrer huden, styrker knogler og brusk, forebygger rynker og styrker dit immunforsvar. Jeg giver dig opskriften i bytte for et simpelt OK.
items.title: Sundhedsmæssige fordele ved gelatine: Hvorfor denne simple mad får opmærksomhed – Serpin Recipes

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Hvorfor spise gelatine? Den er rig pả kollagen, forbedrer huden, styrker knogler og brusk, forebygger rynker og styrker immunforsvaret. Jeg giver dig en simpel OK-opskrift som erstatning'

items.text:
Hi Guys! Lovely to meet you all! I'm new to the group but thought I'd say hello! I'm a West Country actor based in Cornwall and here is a little showreel scene I did a couple years ago! 

Happy to connect with as many fellow people as possible :)

items.text:
Best agencies or best way to find work in the midlands.

Based in Derby and seems to be little to nothing out there

topComments.text: There is Red talent in Coventry I believe if you’re looking for featured work over SA opportunities
AS agency and Red Talent are both Midlands based. Look up Spotlight contact listings for the full directory.

items.text:
Hi, im a 16 year old male with no acting experience from manchester looking for any opportunities for me to get into acting. if anyone knows anyone or anywhere which i could go to that would be very much appreciated. 

kind regards.

topComments.text: At 16 trying to get into acting with no background i would say find yourmlocal amdram for live experience and sign up to a college and then university acting course
I'd definitely recommend looking at joining some local am dram groups to get a taste for what it's like and if you enjoy it! :)

items.text:
Casting Call
Chapter Three Productions are casting SHIPS, a new play premiering in Leith at the Edinburgh Festival Fringe.

We are particularly keen to hear from actors from Black,South Asian, mixed-race, and other underrepresented backgrounds for a major role central to the production.

CONNOR: Merchant seaman, mid 30s–mid 40s. Leither. A complex, emotionally demanding role exploring trauma, loneliness, addiction, identity, and the struggle to reconnect with home and self. Open auditions will be held in Edinburgh in May 2026. 

If interested, please send a CV and headshot to: shipsleith@yahoo.com

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of boat and text

items.text:
FEATURE FILM TABLE READ

Mythological • Science Fiction • Horror

Do you love epic storytelling, powerful characters, ancient mythology, and supernatural suspense?

Trilokam Entertainment is seeking talented actors and performers for an exclusive Zoom table read of an upcoming feature-length Mythological Science Fiction Horror film.

 Indian Actors Preferred  All experience levels welcome  Opportunity to explore unique and compelling characters  Network with fellow actors and creatives

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

 DATE June 21, 2026

 TIME 3:00 PM – 7:00 PM

 LOCATION Zoom (Link provided upon selection)

 FORMAT • Complete script read-through • Two full readings of the screenplay • Character exploration and discussion

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

 SEEKING ACTORS WHO CAN BRING TO LIFE: • Heroes and Heroines • Mythological Figures • Warriors and Sages • Villains and Supernatural Beings • Modern and Futuristic Characters

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

 INTERESTED?

Send your: • Name • Acting Experience (if any) • Headshot or Photo (optional) • Contact Information

TO:

trilokamentertainment@gmail.com

Subject Line: TABLE READ SUBMISSION

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

"Ancient Powers. Future Worlds. Unspeakable Horrors."

Presented by TRILOKAM ENTERTAINMENT

Spaces are limited. Submit today to reserve your opportunity to participate.

items.text:
**CASTING CALL — PAID — Older Male Actor for Short Film — Katy/Houston**

Hi everyone, I’m casting an older male actor for a paid short proof-of-concept film shooting in the Katy/Houston area.

We’re especially looking for someone with a grandfatherly presence, strong emotional range, and ideally some theatre experience.

**Project**: Short proof-of-concept film

**Shoot Date**: Friday, June 19 (night shoot)

**Location**: Katy / Houston area

**Compensation**: Paid

**Genre/Tone**: Dramatic, character-driven

The film centers on a charged meeting between a young man and an eccentric older poet inside a dark, atmospheric study.

**CASTING: EDMUND**

Looking for an older male actor, playing age roughly **60–80**.

Edmund is a warm, eccentric, theatrical older poet — grandfatherly, charming, funny. He can be childlike and playful in one moment, then suddenly shift into accusation, wounded anger, and passionate intensity.

This is a very performance-driven role with a lot of emotional shifts — from humor and playfulness to volatility and anger, and finally vulnerability. The role can be theatrical, but it should still feel human and truthful, not exaggerated or cartoonish.

This is a dialogue-heavy role and would be ideal for an actor with theatre experience, strong presence, and emotional depth.

**British accent required.**

Theatrical/classical background is a plus.

More information on the role and project: [https://www.junipervalleyfilm.com/edmund-ashford](https://www.junipervalleyfilm.com/edmund-ashford)

**TO APPLY**

Email preferred: [your email]

Subject line: EDMUND— [Your Name]

Please include:

Name

Role/position you’re applying for

Location

Relevant experience

Actor headshot/reel/resume, or crew reel/website/credits

Availability on June 19

DMs are also okay, and referrals are very welcome — especially for older actors with theatre experience.

Project website for more context: junipervalleyfilm.com

Thank you!
items.previewDescription: A role of theatrical force and hidden grief. Playful, volatile, tender, and wounded, Malcolm is a man whose theatricality hides a genuine ache. “The Temple of Peace” Malcolm’s study is the outward expression of his inner life. It is within this room that the film’s central confrontation unfo...
items.title: Edmund Ashford — AMDG

items.text:
🚗 AUSTIN, TX CASTING CALL 🚗
Are you local to the Austin area? Do you have a valid drivers license and a car? Put those to good use and submit to our casting!!

*CASTING REAL PEOPLE* (non-union) for a commercial that will film in the Austin area. We are interviewing real people on their opinions, as well as filming them driving their cars. Must be comfortable driving on camera in both highway and residential areas.

DEMO: All ages (18+), genders, and ethnicities are encouraged to apply.

PAYMENT: $500, for a half day of cruising - 4-5 hours total. *Must be able to fill out payroll/I-9 paperwork*

Film Usage: Online, Digital, and New Media

Territory: Domestic and Global

Usage Term: In-Perpetuity

LINK TO SUBMIT:

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – FEMALE SUPPORTING LEAD ROLE (NON-UNION, PAID) 🎬

Independent comedy short film is seeking a Latina actress or an actress who can portray a Latin woman for the role of Sofia filming in Miami, FL.

ROLE: SOFIA
Female, 40s or older preferred. Confident, lively, flirtatious, and larger than life. Sofia has a strong screen presence with expressive reactions and natural comedic instincts. The role contains minor dialogue but strong comedic visual scenes and physical comedy throughout.

Must be comfortable wearing high heels and appearing significantly taller than the male lead (5’5”). Preferred if actress is 5’7” or taller.

⸻

Production Details:
📍 Location: Miami, Florida
📅 Shoot Date: June, Exact date TBD
💰 Compensation: Paid

⸻

Requirements:
• NON-UNION ONLY (Must not be SAG-AFTRA)
• Strong comedic timing, facial expressions, and physical comedy skills
• Confident, charismatic on-camera presence
• Salsa or basic dance ability is a plus 
• Must be local or able to self-report
• Reel and/or video sample REQUIRED

⸻

Submission Instructions:
Please send headshot, reel and/or video sample, and current location to:
📩 elaine@elainefilms.com

Subject Line: Sofia Submission

Serious and available talent only.

CASTING CALL: “DR AMINA [SERIES]”  
Produced by Keba entertainment together with Ushkzan streaming App 
We are looking for passionate, dedicated actors to bring this project to life
  About the series
This is a story about life pressure, the cruelty of life , ambition , greed and crime and a young mother’s response to it.
  Production Details
• Location: Johannesburg, South Africa
• Schedule: AUG –SEP  (Weekends ONLY)
• Professional status: no-name , no agency young actors
• Compensation: Negotiable [daily or  series based rate –based on role] ; cast will receive IMDb credit, on-set snacks, and a collaborative, creatively fulfilling experience with a professional  team
  Audition Instructions
Please submit a self-taped audition[using your phone] . You may have someone reading the other role. Begin the video with your name and anything you want us to know about you.
Email: kebaentertainment@kebaaiworld.com
Subject Line: ACTOR: DR AMINA SERIES
  Character Breakdown
PLEASE SEE ATTACHED POSTER
•   Why Be Part of  DR AMINA [series]?
This is more than just a Series — it’s an opportunity to collaborate on a the reality haunting, South Africans  today; So whether you’re a student , no-name cast building your reel, gaining on-set experience, or looking to be part of something meaningful and atmospheric, DR AMINA [series] offers a unique and professional experience.
  We’re excited to see what you can offer.
Submit your audition and join us.

items.text:
WARSZAWA// CASTING 

Poszukujemy aktorów dubbingowych do niezależnej animacji, z wyjątkowym przesłaniem. 

Realizacja: jeden dzień pomiędzy 1 - 15 lipca 2026 r. w Warszawie. 

Poszukujemy głosów do ról:
* Chłopiec - 7-11 lat 
* Dziewczynka - 8 - 11 lat 
* Chłopiec - 8 - 12 lat 
* Mężczyzna - 65 - 80 lat 
* Kobieta - 65 - 80 lat 
* Kobieta - 25- 45 lat 
* Mężczyzna - 28-45 lat
* Mężczyzna - 40-55 lat (z dobrym akcentem niemieckim!)
* Mężczyźni - 27-45 lat (z dobrym akcentem niemieckim!)
* Mężczyzna - 35- 50 lat (z dobrym akcentem amerykańskim!)

Zgłoszenie powinno zawierać: 
* portfolio
* próbkę głosu 
* dostępność w lipcu (prosimy o wypisanie konkretnych dni) 

Zgłoszenia: 

Na maila: [aleksandragajdosz.produkcja@gmail.com](mailto:aleksandragajdosz.produkcja@gmail.com)

Tytuł: Animacja dubbing casting + nazwa roli (np. Mężczyzna 35-50 lat)

BARDZO proszę o przestrzeganie tytułowania maili. 

Zlecenie: płatne. 

Szczegóły projektu wyślemy wybranym osobom :)

* Kobieta - 25- 45 lat 
* Mężczyzna - 28-45 lat

* Mężczyźni - 27-45 lat (z dobrym akcentem niemieckim!)

items.text:
Ready to learn a new skill in a friendly, beginner-focused class? Think it’s too late to begin? - You’re WRONG and it’s going to feel AMAZING when you discover that for yourself! 🥰

.Move more 
.Meet new people (My students are ACE!)
.Start slow and watch yourself improve
.Builds confidence and busts stress!
.Improves mental health & brain function

First time? 

.£3 CLASS MONDAY!
.FREE class on a THURSDAY!

sharedPost.text:
Let’s talk about it guys… Zumba. 💃

It’s great. I know loads of wonderful Zumba instructors, and there are some fantastic classes across Liverpool — honestly, you’re spoilt for choice! (Feel free to ask if you’re looking and I’ll happily point you in the right direction.)

You’ll get a brilliant workout, feel-good energy and a proper endorphin rush. What’s not to love? ☺️

You’ll find all of that in my sessions too. But also something a little deeper — building real dance technique & musicality alongside your movement confidence. Developing your dance ability as an art form as well as a workout.

And “deeper” doesn’t mean “difficult”.

Yes, there’s a slightly steeper learning curve than most fitness-based dance classes, but that’s where the growth — and the reward — comes from. My classes are still FIRMLY beginner-friendly and designed to help people learn step by step in a supportive environment. (Just check my feedback! 🥰)

Whatever route you choose the important thing is getting out there, giving it a go and moving more! ❤️ 

#learntodance #dancecommunity #confidencethroughdance #learn #moveyourbody

items.text:
## CASTING DO FILMU KRÓTKOMETRAŻOWEGO (KRAKÓW, NON-PROFIT)

📅 Casting stacjonarny: 27–28.06.2026 (9:00–16:00), Kraków, Kampus UJ

🎬 Zdjęcia: 7–9.08.2026

📍 Lokacja zdjęć: **Orzechówka**, okolice Suchedniowa (**ok. 35 km od Kielc**)

Cześć! Jesteśmy niezależną ekipą filmową z Krakowa. W sierpniu realizujemy krótkometrażowy film psychologiczny z elementami thrillera.

**Logline**: Młoda dziewczyna przeżywa zapętlone wydarzenie, w którym gra ze znajomymi w grę towarzyską. W końcu orientuje się, że umiera, a to co widzi, to jej ostatnie wspomnienie, którego kurczowo próbuje się trzymać, by pozostać przy życiu.

Poszukujemy młodych aktorów/aktorek do 4 ról, wyglądających na nie więcej niż 30 lat:

1.     LAURA – Główna bohaterka.

2.     MICHAŁ – Partner Laury.

3.     PAULINA – Przyjaciółka.

4.     DANIEL – Partner Pauliny.

W trakcie 15-minutowego castingu poprosimy Was o:
1. Opowiedzenie czegoś o sobie i swoim doświadczeniu aktorskim, jak również kilku słów o postaci, którą chcielibyście zagrać,
2. Zaprezentowanie swojego zakresu emocjonalnego w grze aktorskiej za pomocą krótkiej improwizacji lub dowolnego przygotowanego tekstu (wiersz, piosenka, monolog itp.), podczas których będziemy proponować Wam różne emocje do przedstawienia,
3. Odegranie krótkiego fragmentu ze scenariusza.

Osobom chętnym prześlemy scenariusz do wcześniejszego przeczytania oraz formularz zapisów na konkretną godzinę castingu.

Ze względu na lokalizację planu mile widziane prawo jazdy! 🚗

items.text:
🎬 **CASTING (płatne) — aktorzy / pary do reklam personalizowanych piosenek** 🎵

Zlecenie zdalne, nagrania realizujecie samodzielnie u siebie (telefon w 1080p/4K w zupełności wystarczy). Bez dojazdów, bez planu — krótka, kameralna scena z prawdziwą emocją.

**Szukamy osób, które:** 🎭 są swobodne i wiarygodne przed kamerą 🎭 potrafią zagrać szczerą reakcję i emocję — bez przesady 🎭 odnajdą się w krótkiej, „życiowej" scenie (materiał pod TikTok / Reels / FB)

**Format scen (ważne):** Piosenka jest w historii prezentem od jednej osoby dla drugiej (np. na przeprosiny lub specjalną okazję), więc scena potrzebuje dwojga ludzi. Realizujemy to na dwa sposoby: 🎭 **Para** — jedna osoba „wręcza" piosenkę, druga reaguje na żywo (idealnie zgłoszenia par / duetów) 🎭 **Solo** — nagrywasz własną, szczerą reakcję na piosenkę, którą „dostajesz" od kogoś przez komunikator na telefonie lub laptopie

Jeśli zgłaszasz się indywidualnie, dopisz, że celujesz w wariant solo (reakcja na wiadomość).

**Charakter ról:**
* emocje i wzruszenie
* relacje i bliskość
* autentyczna, szczera reakcja
* storytelling w pigułce

**Mile widziane:** 📍 doświadczenie aktorskie / epizody / UGC 📍 umiejętność szybkiego wejścia w emocję 📍 własny pomysł na zagranie sceny 📍 dobra jakość obrazu i dźwięku

**Warunki:** ➡️ zlecenie jednorazowe, **płatne** ➡️ rozliczenie na podstawie FV lub przez Useme

**Zgłoszenia:** 📩 [ugc.mailme@gmail.com](mailto:ugc.mailme@gmail.com)

W zgłoszeniu prosimy o:
* portfolio / showreel lub przykładowe materiały
* imię i nazwisko
* numer telefonu
* stawkę za materiał

items.text:
Casting Call Male Lead

Location: Los Angeles 
Seeking… A charismatic emotionally versatile male actor 28-38. For the lead role in an upcoming indie drama. You’ll play a man unraveling after a life altering loss. Think quiet intensity, raw vulnerability and a slow burn arc that carries the whole picture. Must have strong screen presence, natural delivery and at least 3 years acting experience.- stage, film or TV. No prior credits required, just real talent and commitment.

Submit at https://axrcasting.com

items.text:
🎙️ A Message from Aileen Mythen about our upcoming ONLINE Voiceover Class...
We are absolutely thrilled to announce that the incredible Aileen Mythen will be joining our Introduction to Professional Voiceover Online Class this July. @aileenmythen

If you've ever dreamed of working in animation, gaming, commercials or audiobooks, this is an opportunity to learn from one of Ireland's most accomplished voice performers.

With more than 20 years of professional experience, Aileen has built an extraordinary career across voiceover, television, theatre and singing. Her animation credits include work with Disney, Warner Bros. and Brown Bag Films, while her gaming performances feature titles such as Genshin Impact, Arknights, Marvel Cosmic Invasion, The Talos Principle 2 and many more.

Her voice has also been trusted by major brands including Lidl, Mercedes, Barry's Tea, Centra, Zurich Insurance and Irish Ferries, alongside a huge range of commercial campaigns.

Most recently, Aileen completed narration on the new audiobook Our Deadly Summer, written by Emer McLysaght and Sarah Breen and published by Bloomsbury.

This special online session takes place on July 31st and is designed to give aspiring voice actors a genuine insight into the professional industry from someone who lives and breathes it every day.

Whether your passion is animation, gaming, commercials or audiobooks, this is a class you won't want to miss.

🎙️ Book your place now: (Link in bio also) https://pbl-dmd-events.indiestand.com/products/online-introduction-to-voiceover-class-with-pbl-voiceover-coach

items.summary:
🎙️ A Message from Aileen Mythen about our upcoming ONLINE Voiceover Class...
We are absolutely thrilled to announce that the incredible Aileen Mythen will be joining our Introduction to Professional Voiceover Online Class this July. @aileenmythen

If you've ever dreamed of working in animation, gaming, commercials or audiobooks, this is an opportunity to learn from one of Ireland's most accomplished voice performers.

With more than 20 years of professional experience, Aileen has built an extraordinary career across voiceover, television, theatre and singing. Her animation credits include work with Disney, Warner Bros. and Brown Bag Films, while her gaming performances feature titles such as Genshin Impact, Arknights, Marvel Cosmic Invasion, The Talos Principle 2 and many more.

Her voice has also been trusted by major brands including Lidl, Mercedes, Barry's Tea, Centra, Zurich Insurance and Irish Ferries, alongside a huge range of commercial campaigns.

Most recently, Aileen completed narration on the new audiobook Our Deadly Summer, written by Emer McLysaght and Sarah Breen and published by Bloomsbury.

This special online session takes place on July 31st and is designed to give aspiring voice actors a genuine insight into the professional industry from someone who lives and breathes it every day.

Whether your passion is animation, gaming, commercials or audiobooks, this is a class you won't want to miss.

🎙️ Book your place now: (Link in bio also) https://pbl-dmd-events.indiestand.com/products/online-introduction-to-voiceover-class-with-pbl-voiceover-coach

#VoiceOver #VoiceActing #Animation #Gaming #IrishVoiceActor Audiobooks PBLVoiceover VoiceoverTraining Acting Performance GenshinImpact GameVoiceActor
items.title: 🎙️ A Message from Aileen Mythen about our upcoming ONLINE Voiceover Class...

items.text:
Hi all,

I’m looking for one or possibly two actors to help bring a short audio play of mine to life.

The play is called The Never Ending Question and it runs at about 12 minutes. It is a reflective, emotional piece, written for audio, and I would really love to hear it performed properly rather than just sitting on the page.

I’m based in Norfolk, but I am happy to meet anywhere in the south of England if that works. I’d also be very open to doing the whole thing online if the actor has a decent set up and the situation feels right.

Just to be clear, I’m an amateur writer and this would only be for hobby purposes at the moment. I’m not pretending this is a big professional production. I just really want to bring the piece to life and see what it could become.

I have done a little bit of acting myself in the past, and I also produced a very amateur audio play about 10 years ago, so I have a bit of experience, but this is very much a passion project.

I am happy to pay for people’s time, but I need to be honest that the budget is small.

If anyone might be interested, please feel free to message me and I can send over the script.

Thanks,

Paul

items.text:
CASTING CALL – SHORT FILM / MASTER’S DISSERTATION PROJECT

Hi everyone!

I’m helping a friend from my MA course with casting for his short film, which is part of his Master’s dissertation.

He is currently looking for one actor, male or female.

Requirements:
– Must be comfortable handling/using a camera on screen
– Must have access to a car
– Based in or able to travel to Belfast
– Acting experience is welcome, but the director is also happy to have a quick chat with anyone who feels they could be suitable for the role.

If you’re interested, please email ashanavas01@qub.ac.uk with a short introduction, your availability, and any relevant acting/showreel links if you have them.

The director will then arrange a quick chat to explain more about the project, the role, and the filming details.

Thank you so much!

The Circle Is Opening...

Something is being built in Wilmington this summer and it was built for you.  

The Cypher Collective is an adult community arts event series celebrating three of the most powerful art forms alive: dance, spoken word/voice, and visual art. 

Three evenings. 
One circle. 
All summer long.  

June 27 · Dance Cypher 

July 18 · Spoken Word Cypher 

August 22 · Arts Cypher  

Wilmington Ballet Academy of the Dance · 1709 Gilpin Ave, Wilmington DE  

Whether you compete, create, or witness — you belong here. 

Every body. 

Every voice. 

Every vision.

#TheCypherCollective  #WilmingtonDE #CommunityArts #DanceDE #SpokenWord #LiveArt #movebeyondtechnique

➤ Registration required for participants & vendors — movebeyondtechnique.dmt@gmail.com

🎬 CASTING CALL – COMEDY SHORT FILM (NON-UNION, PAID) 🎬

Our team of industry professionals is coming together to create a fun, high-quality comedy short film, giving actors and performers the opportunity to gain experience and work on set with an experienced creative team.

We are currently seeking extras for multiple scenes filming in Miami and Hollywood, FL.

ROLES NEEDED:

• BEACH CHAIR MAN – Male, any ethnicity, age 30–60. Will appear in comedic beach sequence lying in beach chair next to lead actor.

• BEACH WOMEN – Two women, age range 20s–40s, attractive beachgoer types for comedic visual scene at the beach.

• LATIN RESTAURANT EXTRAS – Men and women, all ethnicities, age range 20s–60s. Patrons, dancers, and background characters for lively Miami Latin restaurant/bar scene.

⸻

Production Details:
📍 Locations: Miami, FL & Hollywood Beach, FL
📅 Shoot Dates: June, Exact dates TBD
💰 Compensation: Paid

⸻

Requirements:
• NON-UNION ONLY
• Must be local or able to self-report
• Comfortable working in lively comedy environment
• Some extras may be featured prominently on camera

⸻

Submission Instructions:
Please send headshot/photo, age, current location, and contact information to:
📩 elaine@elainefilms.com

Subject Line: Extras Submission

Serious and available talent only.

🎬 **CASTING CALL – AUE PRODUCTION COMPANY** 🎬

AUE Production Company is now casting for an exciting new television series produced and directed by **Jana Sullivan**.

Jana Sullivan is the writer and producer of *Another Man's Treasure*, which debuted on Tubi, and the author of several successful book series, including numerous ghostwritten works.

We are currently seeking talented actors for a brand-new gritty television series that is set to debut on Tubi. This powerful and groundbreaking series is ready to change the game! We are located in Cincinnati Ohio

Interested actors should submit:

✅ A short bio

✅ A short monologue

Send submissions to: **[actupentemail@gmail.com](mailto:actupentemail@gmail.com)**

Or inbox us directly on Messenger.

Serious inquiries only. We are looking for dedicated talent ready to bring unforgettable characters to life.

URGENT CASTING CALL & CREW CALL

Hi everyone,
I’m am the co director/ co producer of the upcoming student proof of concept, ‘Canary’.
We are looking for cast and crew for this film. We plan to shoot this film on August 10-August 14 in Sydney, Australia . It would be mostly unpaid, but catering services will be provided along with credit and final cuts of the film. We are open to paying compensation for sound, but cannot adhere to daily rates as this is a student production. If you want to be a part of a female led story and production, nows your time to make this happen!

If interested, please email me 
mp4.allish@gmail.com

SUBMISSIONS CLOSE FRIDAY 5TH JUNE, 2026

items.text:
CASTING CALL - The Brother, The wife, and The End of a Life
"Brody had his suspicions. His brother and his wife together? could it be... Or at least that is what he thought until his brother was found dead. Stabbed they said. The killer no where is sight. So why is it his wife seems so nervous..."

Come star in our 3 part Micro Drama student film. Looking for 3 actors, two men aged between 25 and 35, and a woman of the same age.

shooting 21st May & 28th May (10am-5pm) - High Wycombe (subject to change)

Travel and food will be paid for.

If you are interested, email us with a headshot of yourself and any past experience that may be relevant!

elliottfoster17@outlook.com (Elliott), carterelijah@gmail.com  (Elijah), or 22308662@bnu.ac.uk (Finn).

items.text:
Hi, my name is Isabelle, 

I am a third-year student at the University of Winchester studying film production. My crew and I are looking for actors to play our two main characters and side characters for my short film, which I am directing, called Dandelion. 

Auditions will take place at the University of Winchester in late June to early July (if dates change, we will notify you.) Filming will commence from the 26th of October to the 30th of October 2026. 

Please email i.bolton.24@unimail.winchester.ac.uk or my producer at e.seiller-batten.23@unimail.winchester.ac.uk for further information. 

Please review the individual casting call posters for information on each character:

attachments.ocrText: May be a doodle of text that says ''DANDELION' Casting calls... Trapped in a cleaning closet, during a raging zombie horde, two teenagers are forced into uneasy silence- Until their whispered confessions reveal that the horrors outside aren't the only ones they are running from. Pleasereview the individual character casting calls to apply. interested please either email e.seiller- batten.23@unimai.winchester.ac.uk batten. or i.bolton.24@eunimail.winchester.c.uk'

May be a graphic of text that says 'DANDELION June Brooks We are looking for an actress to portray 'June Brooks', our main character! !! REQUIREMENTS: ·FEMALE. •BRUNETTE. •19-23. •5'6-5'8. •5'6- ·MUST BE OKAY WITH FAKE BLOOD, PROSTHETICS. (ALLERGY TESTING WILL BE PROVIDED.) •MUST BE OKAY WITH LGBTO THEMES. June is a 19-year-old girl with brunette hair, tanned complexion and dark eyes. She is reserved and judgmental. PLEASE EMAIL: ILisileletererimain FOR FURTHER INFORMATION.'

May be an image of text that says 'DANDELION Mary Knox We are looking for an actress to portray 'Mary Knox', our main character!! !! REQUIREMENTS: •FEMALE. •BLONDE. ·19-21. ·5'3 5'5. ·MUST BE OKAY WITH FAKE BLOOD, PROSTHETICS. (ALLERGY TESTING WILL BE PROVIDED.) ·MUST BE OKAY WITH LGBTQ THEMES. Mary is an 18-year-old female with blonde hair, fair complexion, and bright eyes. She is bubbly, energetic and humorous. PLEASE EMAIL: :esilleraete.@.ueuimalinin FOR FURTHER INFORMATION.'

May be a doodle of text that says 'DANDELION Darren Brooks We are looking for an actor to portray 'Darren Brooks', a side character! !! REQUIREMENTS: ·MALE. •BRUNETTE. BUZZ CUT. •20-25. ·5'10-6'Ό, ·MUST BE OKAY WITH LGBTQ THEMES. •OKAY WITH SMOKING. Darren is the older brother of June. He has a buzzcut, dark eyes and olive/fair complexion. He is cocky, sarcastic and protective. PLEASE EMAIL: esellelatenamuialint FOR FURTHER INFORMATION.'

May be a graphic of text that says 'DANDELIONA Sadie Banks We are looking for an actor to portray 'Sadie Banks, character! side REQUIREMENTS: •FEMALE. ·BLONDE. ·19-20. 5'6 to 5'9 ·MUST BE OKAY WITH LGBTQ THEMES. Sadie is the school bully to June. She has long blonde hair, a fair complexion and blue eyes. She is bitchy, entitled and mean. PLEASE EMAIL: esilbtetene@bermaintn batten. FOR FURTHER INFORMATION.'

WROCŁAW.

Na czwartek 18.06 szukamy aktorów lub zdolnych amatorów do ról:

2 sceny do zagrania

items.text:
Hej! 

Wrzucam ten casting pownie. 

Do reklamy farmaceutyku (środek na ból) szukam aktywnego mężczyzny, który regularnie uprawia sport. Poszukujemy osoby posiadającej doświadczenie w sportach walki, najlepiej kickboxingu lub muay thai. Nie musi być zawodowcem, ale powinien posiadać pamięć ruchową i umiejętność wykonywania wiarygodnych kopnięć oraz prostych kombinacji treningowych. Ważna jest naturalna charyzma, pozytywna energia oraz wiarygodność sportowa. Nie szukamy kulturysty ani fitness modela. Interesuje nas człowiek, który faktycznie wygląda jak ktoś regularnie trenujący.

TIMING: 

12.06 - termin wysyłania zgłoszeń do godziny 18.00 - sobota 

17.06 - recall 

22.06 - Przymiarki 

24.06 - zdjęcia 

PRAWA I STAWKI: 

Stawka 

1500 zł (dzień) + 3 000 zł (prawa Polska) + 20 % prowizja agencji

Prawa wyśle wybranym osobom. 

Zgłoszenia proszę wysyłać do 13.06 do godziny 12.00 na maila [slavic.squad.cast@gmail.com](mailto:slavic.squad.cast@gmail.com) 

W tytule maila proszę wpisywać : Imię i nazwisko + lek 

W treści maila 
1. Imię i nazwisko 
2. Wiek 
3. Numer telefonu 
4. 2-3 aktualne zdjecia 

 • 5. Informacje jakie masz doświadczenie w wymienionym sporcie.

sharedPost.text:
Hey Leute, für unser aktuelles Low Budget Spielfilm Großprojekt (Kinoformat) suchen wir noch Darsteller für kleinere Rollen, aber auch Komparsen, für Ritter, Dorfbewohner, Räuber, Schmied, Bauern. Ihr habt Zeit und Lust dabei zu sein, dann schickt uns euere Bewerbung mit 2-3 aktuellen Bildern von euch, sowie eure Körpergröße, Kleidergröße, Schuhgröße an: harlekin-filme@web.de oder direkt per Messenger an Harlekin Filme. Gedreht wird im Bayerischen Wald.

Viele Grüße, euer Harlekin Filme Team

Casting call in Berlin 

We’re currently looking for 3 talents for an upcoming lifestyle / UGC shoot:
• Indian woman (20–35)
• Indian man (25–45)
• Native English-speaking blonde/light hair woman (20–35)

No acting experience required - just natural energy and comfort in front of the camera. The shoot is relaxed, authentic, and focused on short-form content.

Interested applicants, please send an email with a few recent photos, casting form and your Instagram profile to the **marianna.vesku@nymph.so**

items.text:
Weekly Wins!

Come on then, what’s been your little victory this week? 🎬

Maybe you landed an audition, nailed a self-tape, finally updated your headshots, or just made it through Monday without swearing at the universe.

Big or small, every win counts, drop yours in the comments and let’s give each other a bit of well earned applause. 👏🎬🇬🇧

topComments.text: I travelled alone, flight, train in another country and found my way to my digs at night. Chuffed with myself.
Shortlisted for one thing and two self tapes from my lovely agent today 🙌🏼🤩

sharedPost.text:
Zum Nachhören 

Herbert Krautwurm ist ein bekannter, zertifizierter Kellergassenführer und ein echtes „Original“ aus dem niederösterreichischen Pulkautal. Er engagiert sich leidenschaftlich für die Erhaltung, Renovierung und Belebung der traditionellen Weinkultur im Weinviertel. Wofür er bekannt ist, darüber sprach Moderatorin Sarah Fuchs mit diesem Unikat.

Gibt es jemanden, der aus Nähe Düsseldorf kommt und sich vorstellen könnte auch etwas mit Kindern zusammen zu machen? 
Wir schreiben unsere eigenen Lieder und brauchen jemanden, der dafür Beats produzieren könnte und auch die Möglichkeit hat zum Recorden.

Wenn dem so ist; einfach anschreiben, auch wenn die Nachricht im Spam landet, wir antworten auf jeden Fall. ￼

Danke im Voraus 🐥👑

items.text:
🎬 **1 Day Adult Intro to the American Accent — Brisbane**
*An intensive with Sandra Bell*

Learn from one of Australia's most experienced dialect coaches — and walk away with showreel footage.

📅 **Saturday 27 June 2026**
🕙 **10am – 4:30pm**
📍 **Queensland Headshots, 1192 Stanley St East, Coorparoo QLD**
💵 **$260 standard | $240 returning students** (GST inc.)

**What's included:**
* Hands-on American accent coaching: placement, rhythm and the sounds that give it away
* Targeted exercises that build the accent into your body, not just your ear
* Performance work with scenes on their feet, under real pressure
* A filmed US accent scene captured on the day
* A green screen newsreader scene, edited and delivered
* Showreel-ready footage you can submit straight away

**About Sandra Bell:**
32 years as one of Australia's most sought-after American accent dialect coaches. 1,000+ students. National workshops. 18 years teaching 3rd year drama students at QUT. 20+ years with TAFTA.

⚠️ **Only 12 places. Minimum 8 for the day to run.**

👉 Book at queenslandheadshots.com/sandrabell
📧 [info@queenslandheadshots.com](mailto:info@queenslandheadshots.com) | 📞 0403 871 686

items.text:
Icons Week is coming 10th-14th August ArtsEd ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

Join the amazing team at Perform Now and the incredible Diantè Lodge, Kerry Ellis, Ben Forster, Hannah Dimtsu, Jacosta Almgil, Ben Harris and Hannah Taylor for an iconic week of fun, intense and high standard training/workshops led by the best in the biz. 

From the West End to Broadway our iconic lineup have done it all!! 

BOOK NOW!!! 

https://performnow.co.uk/icons-summer-week

See you there!
#performnow #icons #youngperformers #londonmums #performanceopportunities

items.text:
At Cherry Pips Acting, we specialise in TV & screen technique! 🎬

As well as self tape technique we also explore blocking movement for camera and shot types, for example a two shot or a tracking shot 🎥

We cultivate a space where young actors can explore, develop understanding and build confidence on camera! 💫

Want to know more about our classes & courses in Manchester or online?

📧 Send us an email today!

classes@mcaa.co.uk

#actingclass #cameratechniques #youngactors #screenacting

Looking for Actors 🎬

I’m looking for people to collaborate on UGC (User Generated Content) videos, simple phone recordings done at home.

📍 Requirements:

• age: 25 to 65 

• comfortable in front of the camera

• very short videos (around 1 minute)

💰 Paid collaboration – £60 per video

🎯 Topic: promotion of a health & wellness product

If you’re interested, please send us (BreatheLio) a message with a short introduction and (if available) your portfolio or comment below.

items.text:
URGENT CASTING CALL - EDINBURGH ‼️‼️
Hello, we are currently looking for a male actor for our student short film with Edinburgh College. We are aiming for film from the 6-9th of May and so are looking for someone who will be available within those days. 

Age - 25-26 ( Casting age - 25-27 or just an older looking 23 and above year olds.)
Identity - Straight, white, man, Scottish.
Personality - Narcissist, passionate, hot headed,
"nice" guy, controlling, and abusive.
Character Synopsis - Dany is dating a girl who discovers that her blood glows. He then discovers that he is obsessed with looking at the blood, and continues to ask his girlfriend (Bevan) to give him more of her blood. Disappointed when she can no longer produce what he wants, he leaves her.

Story Synopsis: A young girl discovers that her blood glows while harming herself. Panicked and disturbed by this discovery, she shows her boyfriend. Who, instead of having care or concern for her, starts exploiting her for her blood as he is enticed by it.
Struggling to perform and produce consistently for him, she grapples with self hate and worth, loosing grip on her mental state. Eventually, when her blood isn’t satisfactory for him anymore, he leaves her feeling worthless after sucking her dry of her youth and innocence.

If you are interested or want to know more please email our director at: ec1958677@edinburghcollege.ac.uk

items.text:
**CASTING CALL –** ***OMG Stories ***

Hi, my name is Mireille and I’m a Casting Agent at Upstream Media leading the search for contributors for the ongoing series ***OMG Stories: Up Close.*** We are looking for individuals with extraordinary lived experiences who would be interested in sharing their story in their own words.

**Details:**

📍 Location: Central London
📅 Shoot dates: Ongoing
💷 Paid opportunity (£££)

**Requirements:**
• All ages welcome
• All genders welcome
• Must be based in the UK or willing to travel

**If you’re interested, please send:**
• A brief summary of your story
• A video link or self-tape

📧 Email: [mireille.lee@upstream-media.co.uk](mailto:mireille.lee@upstream-media.co.uk)

topComments.text: How much does it pay please?

items.text:
CREATIVE SUPPORT CIRCLE

A Psychology & Personal Growth Workshop for Artists, Performers and Creatives

Being creative can be exciting, meaningful and deeply fulfilling.

It can also be isolating.

Many artists, performers, freelancers and creative professionals experience self-doubt, burnout, creative blocks, performance anxiety, uncertainty and the pressure of constantly creating while trying to build a sustainable life.

Creative Support Circle is a supportive space where creatives can explore these challenges together in a respectful and confidential environment.

This introductory workshop is designed for people who create, perform, teach, write, build projects or simply want to reconnect with their creativity and personal growth.

Through guided discussion, reflection and practical psychological tools, participants will have the opportunity to better understand themselves, connect with others facing similar challenges and develop healthier ways of navigating the creative journey.

WHAT TO EXPECT

• Guided discussions and reflection

• Practical psychological insights and tools

• Conversations about creativity, motivation and well-being

• A supportive and respectful group environment

• Connection with fellow artists, performers and creatives

• An opportunity to help shape future workshops based on the group's needs

FACILITATED BY

Begüm Karausta, MA Clinical Psychologist

Begüm Karausta is a Clinical Psychologist based in Warsaw with experience supporting both international and Polish clients.

Alongside her private practice, she works with employees of major organizations across Poland, helping people navigate life transitions, workplace challenges, relationships, emotional well-being and personal development.

Her approach combines professional psychological knowledge with practical tools that participants can apply in everyday life.

WHO IS THIS FOR?

• Artists

• Comedians

• Actors

• Musicians

• Writers

• Facilitators

• Creative entrepreneurs

• Freelancers

• Performers

• Anyone seeking personal growth while pursuing a creative path

WORKSHOP DETAILS

📅 Monday, July 6

🕔 17:00 – 19:00

📍 Praga Południe, Warsaw

(Exact address shared after registration)

LIMITED TO 10 PARTICIPANTS

To ensure a meaningful and high-quality experience, this workshop is intentionally limited to 10 participants only.

The small-group format allows everyone to actively participate, be heard and benefit from deeper discussion and interaction

IMPORTANT

This workshop is intended for education, personal growth and community support.

It is not psychotherapy, psychological treatment or a healthcare service.

A space to reflect.

A space to connect.

A space to grow.

@impactwarsaw

impactwarsaw.com

Inner Circle Telegram:

https://t.me/+xJpuxiG5Au8xMmZk

items.text:
Dzień dobry!
Nazywam się Katarzyna Maria Zawadzka. Jestem aktorką oraz trenerką aktorstwa i wystąpień publicznych. 🎭

Oferuję wsparcie dzieciom i młodzieży w przygotowaniu do:

✨ castingów filmowych i reklamowych,✨ konkursów aktorskich,✨ wystąpień publicznych wymagających świadomej autoprezentacji.

Pomagam również w przygotowaniu profesjonalnych wizytówek aktorskich zgodnych z aktualnymi standardami branżowymi oraz w nagrywaniu scen castingowych. Prowadzę także regularne lekcje aktorstwa zarówno online, jak i stacjonarnie. 🎬

👨‍👩‍👧‍👦 W swojej pracy wspieram również rodziców i opiekunów, zwłaszcza tych, którzy nie są związani z branżą filmową lub teatralną. Pomagam świadomie planować rozwój kariery młodych aktorek i aktorów, podpowiadam, jak odnaleźć się podczas castingów, na jakiej podstawie podejmować trafne decyzje dotyczące współpracy z agencjami i produkcjami oraz jak rozpoznawać potencjalne zagrożenia związane z działalnością w branży.

🤸‍♀️ Od niemal roku z powodzeniem współpracuję także z dziewczęcą grupą wyczynowej gimnastyki powietrznej. Wspieram zawodniczki w budowaniu postaci scenicznej do choreografii, rozwijaniu ekspresji, emocjonalności, charyzmy oraz świadomej interakcji z publicznością i jury.

🏆 Brałam również udział jako trenerka dziecięcych aktorów przy realizacji wielokrotnie nagradzanego na festiwalach filmu krótkometrażowego „Iron Cloud” w reżyserii Nikodema Wojciechowskiego.

📩 Zapraszam do kontaktu!Chętnie odpowiem na pytania i opowiem o możliwościach współpracy dostosowanych do indywidualnych potrzeb dziecka, młodzieży lub grupy.

📧 E-mail: kmzawadzkatrener@gmail.com

💬 Lub wiadomość prywatna

☎️ Lub tel. 732 561 386

Poprzez scenki, ruch, zabawę mini musical uczestnicy uczą się sie pracy emocjami, wyrazu scenicznego budowania pewności siebie. 15+ lat pracy dziećmi mini musical wystąpienia publiczne wyraz sceniczny dla dzieci 6-12lat 6-12 lat kameralne grupy Scena zaczyna się od odwagi!'

Hi! I'm casting for a PAID GIG in Texas, Chicago Area, or Greater Ohio. 

Seeking *REAL* ALLSTATE customers.

PAID • Non Union • Commercial

Dates: 1 shoot day June 23-27 OR Week of July 6, 2026

Must be local in Texas, Chicago Area, or Greater Ohio. 

Are you an Allstate customer who can speak about one of the below experiences?

- Switched from another provider for Home or Auto insurance and saved money

- Purchased Allstate Home Insurance directly through Allstate

- Purchased Allstate Rental Insurance

- Purchased and Experienced Using Allstate Roadside Assistance

- Purchased Allstate Auto Insurance and Roadside Assistance as a bundle

If you are one of the above, apply by filling out the form here: https://rb.gy/miv3i8

items.text:
Calling all young actors.
We are looking for individuals with a comedic flair or potential to feature in our social media content. Although this is an unpaid opportunity, the videos will be shared and can serve as valuable reels for future productions.

@highlight 

Applicants should be based in Etwatwa or Daveyton and audition via self-tapes, which can be sent to 078 121 4807 via WhatsApp. 

We will review all submissions and be in touch.

items.text:
Providing an update for my film project "Call Center"

Title: Call Center

Genre: Comedy / Drama

Logline: Four friends — Kenneth, Nick, Tanisha, and Keisha — navigate the politics, chaos, and absurdity of working in a call center while questioning the rules of life to pass the time. Each member of the group is chasing personal goals while on the clock. Beneath the comedy, Kenneth privately battles personified versions of his Depression and Anxiety as they interact with him during difficult moments.

**CALL CENTER SUBMISSION - [ROLE NAME] - [YOUR NAME]**

Please include:
1. Headshot
2. Resume or acting experience
3. Reel, if available
4. Preferred role
5. Current city/location
6. Availability for the 2nd and 3rd weekends of July
7. Self-tape link or video attachment, if sides are provided

 

Roles:

1.      **Keisha: Female, 30-45. Black or Hispanic/Latina.**

Headstrong, sharp-tongued, stylish, and not afraid to curse someone out when necessary. She’s like a big sister to Kenneth as she understands he does have issues with his mental illnesses and tried to be his anchor to calm him down when needed. Keisha designs clothes, accessories, and trinkets that she sells to local mom-and-pop stores. Her long-term goal is to become a successful designer whose work is sold in major department store chains.

**Tone:** Bold, funny, confident, protective, blunt.

2.      **Tanisha**: **Female, 30-45. Hispanic, White, mixed race, or ethnically ambiguous. Bisexual.**The group’s marijuana connoisseur and experimental cannabis creative. Tanisha is passionate about growing her own strains, engineering unique blunts, and making gummies. When she talks about her machinations she tends to get tunnel vision as she treats her creations like her own children she is proud of. Her dream is to compete in and win local marijuana competitions. She is quirky, unpredictable, emotionally expressive, and deeply committed to her craft.

**Tone:** Chaotic, funny, expressive, strange in the best way, highly animated.

3.      **Derek**: **Male, 30-50. Any ethnicity.**

The department manager. Derek is positive, supportive, and genuinely wants his team to succeed. He tries to keep the department moving forward while managing strong personalities, office politics, and workplace chaos.

**Tone:** Supportive manager, patient, professional, quietly funny.

**4.      Customer (Voice role): Male, 30-50. Any ethnicity.**

Calling into customer support and speaks with Kenneth. Is angry and hostile as he has a technical support problem that he wants fixed not now, but “Right Now”. Has a verbal back and forth with the lead character Kenneth as he tries to resolve the issue.

Production Company: Ch1-R0n1n productions

Production Type: Indie Web Series

Contact Information: mcgeebrian8@gmail.com

Run Time: Short (23 minutes)

Compensation: Paid. $100 flat rate per role for two shooting days.

Union Status: Non-Union

Audition Information: Callback(s) within three weeks. 

Shooting Schedule: Planning for the 2nd-3rd weekend of July. 2 day 10 hour shoot.

Filming Location: Greenwood Village, Co

Project Description: *Call Center* is an adult workplace comedy-drama about four friends surviving the politics, gossip, frustrations, and absurd conversations of life inside a corporate call center. While taking calls and navigating management drama, the group works on their personal goals, side hustles, relationships, and dreams while questioning the strange rules of adulthood. Beneath the comedy, the story follows Kenneth as he privately battles personified versions of Depression and Anxiety, giving the series an emotional inner-world contrast to the chaos of the office.

**Content Notes:** Adult language, sexual humor, cannabis references, workplace conflict, and mental health themes including depression, anxiety, and suicidal ideation.

*****Extended Deadline + Adjusted Stipend*****

# Stagebugz Theatre is still seeking actors for "Cryptophasia"!

The deadline to submit a video audition for this world premiere production has been extended through 12 PM (noon) on Sunday, June 14th.

## **Dates:**

**Rehearsals- **June 25th through July 18th, scheduled around actor availability (A tentative rehearsal schedule can be viewed *HERE***)** 

**Tech rehearsals- **July 20th-22nd 

**Performances-** July 23rd, 24th, and 25th at 7 PM; July 26th at 2 PM

## **Compensation:** 

Actors will be paid a guaranteed $100 stipend, plus portion of net profits

***For More Information and to Submit An Audition, Visit: ****https://www.stagebugztheatre.com/auditions*

sharedPost.text:
‼️UWAGA Śląsk – ZABRZE i okolice‼️ 
🔥Nowy serial kryminalny🔥

Szanowni Państwo, serdecznie zapraszamy na plan filmowy. Realizujemy nowy serial - śląską wersję ogólnopolskiego hitu, który ma miliony widzów! Przed nami dwa ostatnie tygodnie grania!!  Obecnie poszukujemy:

💥PIŁKARZE  NA TRENINGU (18-26 lat)
Data: 17.06 / środa – 1 scena (podczas której, nasi zawodnicy trenują przed meczem. 
Miejsce: Zabrze / Stadion „SPARTA”
Stawka: 300 zł 

‼️Zapraszamy większą ilość panów – zgłoszenia grupami mile widziane 😉
‼️ Nagranie sceny potrwa około 2 do 3 godzin! (ale wysiłku będzie na 40 minut XD)

💲Stawka netto (do wypłaty) - płatne gotówką po planie💲 
(Wypełniamy umowę o dzieło)

💥Na planie dostępna kawa, herbata oraz woda i przekąski.

📩Zgłoszenia: marcin@mascaratmedia.com 📩
W tytule prosimy wpisać „PIŁKARZ”
 
📩Zgłoszenie powinno zawierać:
1. Imię i nazwisko + wiek, waga,
2. aktualne zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki,
3. miasto zamieszkania,
4. krótkie info o doświadczeniu (+ np. video-wizytówka)
5. oraz oczywiście numer telefonu.

Serdecznie zapraszamy :)   

UWAGA: Zgłaszając się do roli, jest konieczność zarezerwowania całego dnia, ponieważ "godziny grania" podawane są dzień wcześniej. (Oczywiście, wszystko do ustalenia drogą telefoniczną).

Kraków, szukam aktorów do roli żydów 

Do spektaklu niezależnej grupy teatralnej na podstawie autorskiego scenariusza szukam aktorów (niekoniecznie profesjonalnych), którzy wcieliliby się w role braci żydowskich w getcie. 

Przewidziana premiera spektaklu: październik/listopad 26. Projekt niekomercyjny aczkolwiek nie wiadomo, gdzie nas może ta historia zaprowadzić. Terminy prób do dogadania. Zapraszam na priv. Pozdrawiam.

items.text:
🎬 SZUKAM AKTORÓW DO NAGRYWEK REKLAMOWYCH

Poszukuję mężczyzn w wieku ok.35 i ok. 50 lat do współpracy przy produkcji materiałów wideo dla marki z branży automotive – dywaniki samochodowe i akcesoria.

Co wchodzi w zakres współpracy?
✅ Nagrywki organic (social media)
✅ Materiały do reklam płatnych (Meta / Google Ads)

Co oferuję?
💰 Wynagrodzenie płatne (szczegóły do ustalenia indywidualnie)
📋 Jasne briefy i gotowe scenariusze

Jeśli jesteś aktorem, content creatorem lub po prostu dobrze wypadasz przed kamerą – zapraszam do zgłoszeń!

👉 Formularz zgłoszeniowy: https://forms.gle/NwbjJjbJxA7Z1chSA

Poszukuję aktorów o typie urody zbliżonym do tego ze zdjęć.

sharedPost.text:
Hey Leute, für unser aktuelles Low Budget Spielfilm Großprojekt (Kinoformat) suchen wir noch Darsteller für kleinere Rollen, aber auch Komparsen, für Ritter, Dorfbewohner, Räuber, Schmied, Bauern. Ihr habt Zeit und Lust dabei zu sein, dann schickt uns euere Bewerbung mit 2-3 aktuellen Bildern von euch, sowie eure Körpergröße, Kleidergröße, Schuhgröße an: harlekin-filme@web.de oder direkt per Messenger an Harlekin Filme. Gedreht wird im Bayerischen Wald.

Viele Grüße, euer Harlekin Filme Team

items.text:
🇮🇹🇻🇳CASTING CALL 🇻🇳🇮🇹
INDIE SHORT FILM

Title: All Families Are Dysfunctional
Genre: Romantic- Comedy / Drama (Dramedy)
Location: Montreal, QC
Compensation: Unpaid/Honorarium (Food & Transportation Provided)

LOGLINE

When an unexpected pregnancy binds together the children of a Vietnamese and an Italian family, their reluctant marriage creates tension as cultures, traditions, and family loyalties begin to clash.

CHARACTER BREAKDOWNS

Amy

Female, 22–28, Vietnamese-Canadian

Amy is pregnant, hormonal, and fiercely independent. Used to trusting her own judgment, she struggles when her family and future in-laws begin making decisions on her behalf. Intelligent and strong-willed, she often masks vulnerability with anger. Her friendship and affection are hard-earned, making her connection with Micheal feel especially meaningful.

MICHEAL

Male, 22–28, Italian-Canadian

Micheal is optimistic, dependable, and action-oriented. His love language is acts of service, and he often uses humor to avoid difficult conversations. While not always the best with words, he consistently shows up for the people he loves. His practical nature complements Amy's fiery personality.

HIEN

Female, 45–60, Vietnamese

Amy's mother. Hien is brutally honest, often crossing the line between truthfulness and cruelty. Though her criticisms stem from love and concern, she struggles to communicate her emotions effectively. She intentionally speaks Vietnamese even though her English is excellent, reinforcing the distance that has developed between her and Amy.

CARMELLA

Female, 50–65, Italian

Micheal's mother. Self-made, successful, and fiercely protective of her family. Carmella believes there is a proper way to do things and isn't afraid to share her opinions. She takes immense pride in her sons and sees herself as the family's matriarch.

JOHNNY

Male, 50–65, Italian

Micheal's father. Traditional, authoritative, and proud. Johnny carries himself with confidence and expects respect from those around him. Beneath his tough exterior lies a deep commitment to family values.

LUCA

Male, 20–30, Italian-Canadian

Micheal's younger brother. Loud, playful, and occasionally inappropriate. Luca loves action movies, gangster films, and getting a reaction out of people. His crude jokes often create tension, though his intentions are rarely malicious.

NONNO ANTONIO

Male, 70–90, Italian

Micheal's grandfather. Easygoing and content with life's simple pleasures. Having reached an age where he no longer feels the need to impress anyone, Antonio serves as a grounding presence amid the chaos of family conflict.

SUPPORTING ROLES – AUNTS & UNCLES

Any Gender, 30+

Members of Amy's extended Vietnamese family. Opinionated, judgmental, and always watching. They spend most of their time eating, drinking, gossiping, and quietly fueling family tensions.

AUDITION INSTRUCTIONS

Auditions will be conducted through self tapes or will be done on zoom. 

Email holisanguyen@gmail.com for instructions on auditioning, sample scripts will be provided. 

Supporting roles do not require a scripted audition scene.

To apply, please send:
• Headshot or recent photo
• Resume (if available)
• Self-tape audition
• Contact information

Email: holisanguyen@gmail.com

We welcome performers of all experience levels and encourage submissions from emerging actors interested in collaborating on a heartfelt, culturally grounded independent film.

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of text that says 'AMÉLIE THE LIGHTING IS SOFT AND SLIGHTLY YELLOW IN COLOR, EVEN DURING SCENES THAT TAKE PLACE IN THE MIDDLE OF THE DAY. THIS GIVES THE IMPRESSION THE WHOLE FILM TAKES PLACE AT DUSK. SPECIAL EFFECTS ARE USED ONLY OCCASIONALLY, To DEMONSTRATE THE CHARACTERS' IMAGINATION, THOUGHTS, AND FEELINGS.'

Liebe Filmschaffende,
Faire Gagen läuft derzeit  nur noch auf Sparflamme und Du kannst das ändern. 
Gesucht werden möglichst aktive Filmschaffende im Bereich Komparserie und/oder Darstellung.

Dabei  unterstützt oder leitest Du eine äußerst beliebte und erfolgreiche Marke unter Filmschaffenden in Form von Beiträgen, informieren über beispielhafte oder unfaire Gesuche oder mit eigenen Ideen.

Engagier Dich für ein Ehrenamt, ganz ohne Druck bei absolut freier Zeiteinteilung 🤗
Gerne PN an Faire Gagen oder Klaus Stutzer

sharedPost.text:
+++ Agentur Producers Friend vs. Agentur Filmgesichter u.a. Agenturen +++

Ein bekannter Berliner Podcast bekommt die Frage: "Was sagt ihr zur Komparsen-Agentur Producer's Friend?" Die ehrliche Antwort folgt...

(Lesezeit ca. 3 Min.)

Seit vielen Jahren hat Faire Gagen und ein Großteil seiner Anhängerschaft eine klare Meinung zu diesem Vergleich. Ganz ähnlich sehen dies auch die Moderatoren Frank und Thomas beim beliebten Berliner Podcast "Frisch vom Set".

Hauptkritikpunkt ist auch hier das  als unfair angesehene Geschäftsmodell der Agentur.
Nur zwei kurze Zitate: "Selbst ohne Drehtag wird abgebucht" oder "Der Name der Agentur Producer's Friends sagt eigentlich schon alles ..."

Als besonders faires Gegenbeispiel wird u.a. im Podcast die größte Berliner Agentur, Filmgesichter genannt. 
Aber auch sehr viele andere Agenturen in Berlin, NRW, Hamburg und teilweise sogar in München zeigen uns tagtäglich und seit sehr vielen Jahren, dass es auch fair und damit gleichzeitig komparsenfreundlich oder "Extras Friends" funktioniert.

Aber wie auch im Podcast und mehrfach auch von uns an alle Filmschaffende appelliert:

+++ Wir alle müssen selbst entscheiden für was wir uns wert sind zu drehen +++

+++ Dabei dürfen wir jedoch nicht  vergessen, dass wir mit diesen - nunmal in unserem Sektor völlig unüblichen - Geldern doppelt bezahlen, da ja bereits die Produktionen unsere Agenturen und damit unsere Gagen bezahlen.
Leider setzen "wir" (ob bewusst oder unbewusst) unsere vielen fair agierenden Agenturen damit jedoch zwangsläufig einem nicht unerheblichen Wettbewerbsnachteil am Markt aus +++

So müssen "wir" uns selbstkritisch hinterfragen:

"Ist es fair, wenn wir uns unsere Drehtage bei Agentur PP förmlich erkaufen und womöglich gleichzeitig bei Filmgesichter (Berlin, NRW) Wanted, Müller, BB... (Berlin) 
Schwichtenberg, Ohler, WIWA, Eick&Weber... (NRW) Glocker ... (München) und den vielen anderen fairen Agenturen kostenlos (bzw. für zumindest überschaubare Gebühren) deren Fairness gerne mitnehmen um nicht zu sagen, einzusacken?
 
So liegt es (noch!) in unserer Hand, ob auch weiterhin unsere fairen Agenturen am Markt bleiben und nicht z.B. bedingt durch finanzielle Schieflagen sterben oder eben (notgedrungen) ähnlich bezahlte Geschäftsmodelle für uns entwerfen müssen um zu überleben (Beisp. DBF, München).

In unseren persönlichen Gesprächen mit den Agenturleitungen konnte man immerwieder heraushören, dass dieser Weg eigenlich nicht deren Philosophie sei - auch, da sie vor ihrer Agenturgründung oft selbst als Komparsen gearbeitet haben und unsere Arbeit, aber auch unsere Initiative recht gut kennen und damit unsere Beweggründe sehr gut verstehen. 
Die Lage ist jedoch teilweise recht ernst, wie bereits die Verbreitung von sogenannte Premium Modellen aufzeigt.

(Bitte gerne  auf "Faire Gagen" teilen o. zumindest reagieren, da nur so unsere textlastigen Beiträge eine größere Verbreitung finden, Danke🙂)

+++ Link zum Podcast und weitere Infos in der Kommentarleiste nur auf Faire Gagen 
 
Liebe Grüße 
Klaus
Initiative Faire Gagen 

... und nicht  zuletzt: Faire Gagen Sucht Nachwuchs🤗

#kompase #casting #filmschaffende #agenturen

items.text:
KentKasper.net 

The Headline: The 24/7 Celebrity Mentor (Your Secret Weapon in a Town That Eats Hopes for Breakfast)

Forget everything you think you know about "acting coaches."

In an industry where 90% of actors quit within a few years—swallowed by the noise, the rejection, and the chaos—you need more than just a teacher. You need a lifeline. You need a strategist, a therapist, a hype-man, and a legal mind who knows exactly where the Hollywood minefields are buried.

You need Kent Kasper.

Having Kent on your team isn't just hiring a coach. It’s like having a 24/7 concierge for your career. It’s having someone in your corner who ensures that while the other 90% are tapping out, you’re stepping up.

---

What is Kent? He’s the "Swiss Army Knife" of Show Business.

· Part Mentor: Who extracts the gold from your gut and puts it on the screen.
· Part Life Coach: Who keeps you sane when the silence is deafening.
· Part Teacher: Who hands you the tools.
· Part Guide: Who walks you through the dark.
· A splash of Muse: To spark the fire.
· A dash of Magic: Because let's face it, you need it in Tinseltown.

Kent Kasper is the Master Power Coach who proves that "luck" is just a fancy word for what happens when opportunity meets preparation. And no one—and I mean no one—prepares you like Kent.

---

The Résumé of a Warrior (And Why It Matters to You)

Kent isn’t a theorist. He’s a SAG-AFTRA working actor with 40+ years of blood, sweat, and applause. He has navigated the very trenches you’re trying to cross.

· The Laughs: A national headlining comedian for over a decade. (HBO, Showtime, Netflix, Comedy Central—yeah, those stages).
· The Credits: Co-starred in over 25 TV shows (Mad Men, Monk, Rules of Engagement) and 20 films (Apollo 13, Space Jam).
· The Face: Starred in over 200 commercials. (If you’ve watched TV in the last 20 years, you’ve seen him).
.  Veteran of over a dozen vertical micro dramas.
· The Icon: For 18 years, he was the go-to Dr. Phil lookalike—doubling for him in commercials, films, and private events.
· The Legal Eagle: He holds a master degree and a law degree from Thurgood Marshall School of Law and served as a NYC Assistant District Attorney. (He knows how to read contracts so you don't have to cry later).
. Author of 4 acting books on Amazon 
. Corporate Trainer -Consultant - Keynote speaker to top Fortune 500 companies..

His Philosophy: "Don't Fight Your Type, Master It!"

---

The Kent Kasper Difference: The "Concierge" Treatment

Most coaches give you a one-hour slot and send you on your way. Kent gives you systems.

His laser-focused, battle-tested methodology covers 100+ essential areas of the biz that most actors don’t even know exist. We’re talking:

· Audition Preparation: Turning your nerves into nuclear weapons. Booking the room!

· The Trinity (Agent/Manager/CD Blitzes): Getting you in the rooms that matter
.
· Branding, Marketing & Packaging: Turning you from a "hopeful" into a product Hollywood wants to buy.

· Demo Tape Preparation: Because your reel is your resume.

.Vertical micro drama prep .

.Photo shoot branding & packaging 

Working with Kent increases your opportunities by 1000%. And when those opportunities come? He prepares you like a heavyweight boxer stepping into the ring with Iron Mike Tyson. You won't just survive; you'll dominate.

---

Who Has Kent Coached?

Everyone. Literally.

From diapers to Depends..

He’s worked with families, couples,toddlers tweens ,teens ,seniors and friends. He’s helped firefighters, doctors, lawyers, bus drivers, teachers, veterans, chefs, and salesmen drop their day-job identities and pick up their acting dreams.

Whether you’re in your living room or on the other side of the globe, Kent is there. Sessions are available in-person, or via FaceTime, Zoom, Instagram, and Facebook Messenger.

---

The Bottom Line (Irresistible Edition)

You can try to navigate the Hollywood minefield alone. You can hope for a lucky break. You can be one of the 90% who bows out.

Or, you can have a 24/7 ally.

You can have a man who has been a lawyer, corporate trainer , a professional union actor , published author , a comedian, a TV star, a Dr. Phil celebrity look alike and a mentor to thousands. You can have someone who answers the call when you're panicking before an audition, who strategizes when you're lost, and who celebrates when you win.

There is no other coach on this planet with the background, the care, and the relentless drive of Kent Kasper.

This is your invitation. Let’s get to work…

items.text: Jeg tog hen til butikken og købte noget bacon, som jeg tog med hjem for at spise. Da jeg åbnede pakken og tog et par skiver, fandt jeg dette i baconen. Helt ærligt, min appetit forsvandt med det samme. Jeg har siddet i køkkenet i en halv time og stirret på det og prøvet at finde ud af, hvad det er. Er der nogen, der ved, hvad det kunne være? Tjek den første kommentar for svaret.

TV CASTING! 

Would you and your household like to tackle an array of creative and head-scratching tasks at home in the hope of winning a cash prize?  The makers of Taskmaster are looking for households across the UK to take part. 

More information and application form here: [www.avalontvcasting.com](http://www.avalontvcasting.com/)

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'পিক THE MAKERS OF TASKMASTER ARE CASTING NOW FOR A NEW CHANNEL SHOW! your household enjoy watching Taskmaster and would you love the chance the tasks? you could compete together against other households from the comfort your own home AND with chance of winning cash prize? Avalon Television looking for fun and quick-thinking families/housemates/couples to tackle creative and tasks Alex Horne of Taskmaster fame host information and application form link below We only www.avalontvcasting.co Terms and conditions apply. applications from household member aged 18+ Closing date 23:59 on Friday 26th June 2026. information you provide application privacy policy:'

This summer, the spotlight returns brighter than ever as Talent Search UK celebrates 17 YEARS of discovering the undiscovered! 🇬🇧✨

Join our incredible judging panel LIVE on TikTok including BRITAINS GOT TALENT Kathleen Jenkins , The Voice UKS Kelly Hastings & Vocal Coach & Producer Joei Blake as we search for the UK’s next rising stars in singing, entertainment, and performance! 🌟

🔥 LIVE SERIES DATES:
📅 Every Monday from July 6th – August 24th
📍 LIVE on TikTok

🏆 WHAT’S UP FOR GRABS?
✨ The UK Title & Trophy
🎥 Music Video & Recording Opportunities
📱 Huge Social Media Promotion
🌍 Exposure Across the UK

Whether you sing, dance, entertain, perform magic, or have a unique talent — THIS is your moment to shine. ⭐

🎟 Applications NOW OPEN
🌐 www.TalentSearchUK.com

#TalentSearchUK #TikTokLive #UKTalent #Singers #Performers #TalentCompetition #TheVoiceUK #BritainsGotTalent #MusicArtists #UnsignedArtists #TalentShow #LiveShow #DiscoverTalent #UKMusic #ApplyNow

sharedPost.text:
Having so much fun on Thursdays! This might look a bit tricky if you've never danced before but I promise you this is a BEGINNERS class! Completely welcoming, completely aimed at "Come and have a go!!" We dance because we enjoy it, because it's good for us. Not for perfection. 👌 And you'll get a great workout in the process. Come and find your new favourite thing to do! These guys are 3 sessions in and haven't looked back.

#danceliverpool #adultclass #trysomethingnew #britneyspears #MoveMore

Train in ways that both challenge and excite you. 

Booking now open for Meisner 1 Fundamentals & Repetition. 🕺💃

The last few have sold out. So be quick! 🏃‍♀️🏃💨

Come join our community! 🫶

Train for Authenticity, Perform with Power. 🎭🎬

Unleash your authentic self and discover new emotional depths in your performances. The Meisner technique transforms more than just your acting—it transforms you.

Class is limited to 12 students.

Meisner Technique - Intro & Repetition Skills
Book Now @ www.bodymindvoice.co.uk/meisner-intro
 Consent-informed connection and sustainable emotional exploration - unlock your true potential!

📅 Course Details:
* Dates: Wednesdays, 4 pm – 7 pm
* Duration: 17 June - 22nd July
* Location: Marylebone, London
* Class Size: Limited to 12 places for personal attention

🎟️ What’s Included: ✅ Six guided in-person sessions ✅ 1 personalised feedback session ✅ 1 FREE drop-in Actor Training Session for continued practice 🎉

Whether you’re a beginner or an experienced actor looking to refresh your skills, this course will help you tap into deeper dynamics and develop truthful behaviour in your work.

💰 Fees:
* £225 for 20+ hours of training
* £205 each if you bring a friend (save £20 each!) 💥

The Meisner Technique has consistently proven to build truthful, dynamic acting—the glue that ties all disciplines together! 💡 Join us in a fun, supportive environment that fosters genuine connection and growth. 🌱

BOOK NOW: www.bodymindvoice.co.uk/meisner-intro
Or email - mail@lawrencecarmichael.com

⚡ Limited to just 12 places—secure your spot today!

#actortraining #londonactor #londonactors

items.text:
As an agent, it always amazes me how little information most actors have on how their Spotlight profile presents to the industry. With over 20 years experience in all aspects of the industry, I offer detailed, personalised Spotlight Surgeries to help curate and optimise your Spotlight profile to maximise your castability. Sessions start at just £25 for 20 minutes. Please use the link below to book your session and let's work to get you working!

Testimonials: 
“Just wanted to say huge thanks again for your time advice and expertise last night. Really appreciate the feedback and found it to be incredibly informative.” (April 2026)

items.text:
Tancerki potrzebne do obłędnej ekipy Tancerze PL - najbliższe zlecenia 6, 13 czerwca 2026. Narazie szukamy osób dostępnych w czerwcu które już z nami tańczyły (!!!) - w tym wypadku dzwońcie do Sylwii: 602406111 . 

Inne Tancerki i Tancerze, którzy chcieliby dołączyć do grupy na stałe - wkrótce ogłosimy casting. Jeśli chcesz się zgłosić już teraz - zaobserwuj naszego instagrama i skomentuj ten post. Następnie wyślij zgłoszenie przez grupa@tamcerze.pl . 

Zlecenia są choreograficzne (Tancerki klubowe, gogo dancers, fordanserki - nie dadzą rady) - próby (na tę chwilę) wyłącznie w Warszawie. Opcjonalnie osoby z 3miasta i okolic.

Uwaga, wyłącznie osoby wszechstronne tanecznie z dobrymi podstawami tańca jazzowego lub klasycznego lub towarzyskiego. Tylko osoby z klasą, i eleganckim, naturalnym wyglądem (przesadnie usta, botox itp - to nie nasza estetyka) 

PS. Jeśli tańczysz tylko high heels, sambę, bachate… dowolną wąską specjalizację - a nie masz podstaw klasycznych - możesz spróbować, ale będzie ciężko dorównać do poziomu grupy. Zaobserwuj nas i poczekaj na casting

items.text:
⚽ PILNY CASTING DO SERIALU „FORWARD” ⚽

Szukamy aktorów i aktorek mieszkających w Warszawie lub okolicach do anglojęzycznego serialu sportowego „FORWARD”.

📍 Zdjęcia: Warszawa
📅 Okres zdjęciowy: 15–24 czerwca
🎬 8 dni zdjęciowych

Poszukujemy osób swobodnie mówiących po angielsku, gotowych przesłać krótkie self-introduction w języku angielskim oraz dostępnych w terminach wskazanych przy rolach.

Wśród ról znajdują się m.in.:
• fanki drużyny piłkarskiej,
• dziennikarz sportowy,
• piłkarze,
• lekarze,
• inwestor Mr. Jones.

Wszystkie role posiadają kwestie dialogowe w języku angielskim.

Jeśli jesteś zainteresowany/a udziałem w projekcie, wyślij proszę wiadomość prywatną wraz ze swoim zgłoszeniem.

Czekam na Wasze wiadomości!

Irina
Casting Director
