items.text:
POSZUKUJEMY STATYSTÓW

Do teledysku muzycznego o tematyce historycznej poszukujemy mężczyzn w wieku 30 do 45 lat.

Wymagania:

• naturalny wygląd

• brak widocznych tatuaży

• brak nowoczesnych fryzur i zarostu

• mile widziane doświadczenie przed kamerą, ale nie jest wymagane

Plan zdjęciowy wyjazdowy.

Wyjazd z Wałbrzycha.

Termin zdjęć: 2 lipca 2026 r.

Najchętniej osoby z Wałbrzycha i okolic.

Zainteresowane osoby prosimy o kontakt w wiadomości prywatnej wraz ze zdjęciem.

items.text:
Hello! My name is Waleska Duno, I'm the producer of "The Starting Line" a capstone project and student short film written by Tyasia Poole in association with Valencia College, Orlando Fl.

We are currently focused on finding CHRIS our male lead, but still accepting tapes for the other characters!

This is non-paid and non-union. Food will be provided.

Self-tapes are acceptable until June 16th! 

The Filming will take place July 11-13th in the Orlando area, please email me if you have any questions! 

Sides will be provided via email. 

Stay Groovy, 

Waleska Duno

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of text

topComments.text: Do you need a child labor coordinator, talent coordinator or studio teacher? I am all three and live in Atlanta, but have a place in Orlando should you need the help. Have worked on 5 scad student films to help out so let me know! Good luck

items.text:
#casting #shortfilm
ASAP

Email: pakanita8@gmail.com

Casting 4 actors for a 16mm short film. Paid. 

One shooting day in LA, June 12th - 15th. More likely a few hours only.

Please, send a selfie in daylight, reel or video of you speaking/reading a monologue/ poem, resume if you have one.

A Friend( Supporting )

21-26y.o, woman. Naitive Russian  speaker, fluent English required with a minimal or near-native accent. Conventionally attractive. Maude Apatow type. Shoe size 7

Another girl (Supporting )

21-26y.o young black woman. Conventionally attractive. Standard American accent. Couple of lines. 

Quenlin Blackwell type.

Taxi driver (Supporting )

Looking for a Black woman in her 40s-50s with her own car. Real driver for Uber /Lyft preferred.Myra Lucretia Taylor type.

Evicted Women (Featured Background ) 

Background role.White women in her 40s-50s, blonde hair

items.text:
CASTING CALL: 

Casting info for Resurrection In The Field Of Blood. 

These are $- PAID -$ roles. Pay differs depending on the role, and I will personally talk with each actor for negotiations.

You don't have to be local to be considered for a role. If an actor does a good audition, and they are a good fit for the role, then they will be cast. If you aren't local, travel and lodging will be taken care of by the production company.

Filming will be in Placerville, CA, Orangevale, Citrus Heights, Sacramento. Specific start date has not yet been finalized. That will be decided once casting is complete. However, I do plan to have it in the can for the March 1st. deadline for the early to mid March deadline for Cannes Film Festival. 

LOGLINE: 

**Resurrection in the Field of Blood** is a dark gothic horror epic that reimagines vampire mythology through the lens of faith, guilt, and redemption. Rather than a tale of romance or monstrous bloodlust, it is the tragic journey of a cursed immortal desperately seeking salvation—one soul at a time.

SYNOPSIS:

**RESURRECTION IN THE FIELD OF BLOOD**

For over two thousand years, Judas Iscariot has walked the earth carrying the weight of the greatest betrayal in human history.

After accepting thirty pieces of silver to betray Jesus of Nazareth, Judas believes death will free him from his shame. Instead, he awakens to a fate far worse than death. Condemned by God and unable to die, Judas is transformed into something neither fully human nor fully monster—a creature sustained by blood and cursed to wander the world until the end of time.

As centuries pass, Lucifer appears before the broken apostle with an unexpected offer: guidance. Not out of kindness, but out of amusement. Lucifer teaches Judas how to survive, how to master the strange powers growing within him, and how to embrace the curse that God has placed upon him. Yet Judas refuses to become the ruthless predator Lucifer desires.

Driven by guilt and the desperate hope that redemption may still be possible, Judas forges his own path. He becomes a relentless hunter of evil, feeding only upon murderers, tyrants, and those who prey upon the innocent. From the blood-soaked battlefields of ancient empires to the dark alleys of modern cities, he wages a secret war against humanity's worst monsters while battling the darkness within himself.

But every life he takes raises the same haunting question: Can a man erase the sin that changed the course of history? Or is Judas forever condemned, no matter how many evil souls he removes from the world?

As the centuries unfold and the final days draw near, Judas finds himself caught between Heaven and Hell, pursued by forces that believe redemption is impossible. To prove them wrong, he must confront the truth about his betrayal, his curse, and the God whose forgiveness he has sought for millennia.

CHARACTERS:

God - Any age, and race. This isn't going to be your "traditional" God. They certainly aren't going to look like Gandolph. We are going to be a bit more hip and modern.

Jesus - male, 33, This will also not be your "traditional" Jesus and what society thinks he looks like. He will definitely have long hair, no beard, possibly a goatee, but clean shaven preferred. He is funny, speaks in riddle and parables. He will answer questions, but never straight forward.

Judas - Male 30-40, prefer long hair. There will be facial hair in 1 scene, then clean shaven for the rest. Judas is haunted by his sins, and his sole purpose is finding redemption.

Helel - "shinning one", "Morning Star". (AKA Lucifer) Male 18 - ? Long or short hair. Any race. He is extremely beautiful, think Model type. He is helping Judas throughout his Journey. He pops in and out of different scenes like a phantom. Very cunning, but also has a comical side.

Wakan - 30-? Prefer Native American, of looks Native American. Male or Female. They are a lover of the paranormal and horror. They have an open mind to things, and asks a lot of questions. 

Julian Corbin - 40-57. Wakans friend and sidekick. He is also a lover of the paranormal and horror. He is VERY inquisitive about things, and seeks the truth in all things. Male, any race.

Detective Cato - I wrote this for an African American, but if the right actor comes along, race isn't an issue. Cato has been on the force for a while, loves whisky in his coffee, and is relentless in finding out the truth for strange cases that can't seem to be solved. 40-50, Male. 

Detective Veil - She is the partner of Cato. 40-50, and race. She is intrigued with the paranormal, and has several conspiracy theories about a lot of things. She is fun loving and has a good head on her shoulders. 

Father Declan - Male, 30-50. He has a troubled past, but feels that he has redeemed himself once he became a priest. He is a believer, but not a fanatic. He also has an open mind about all things and is a great listener. 

Luna - female - 21-40. Very gothic, and is a bartender. She loves to talk, and dives into the minds of everyone that she talks too. She believes in religion, but also believes and embraces the darker realm of the spirit world. She doesn't like to be alone, and is always seeking a companion, even if it's just for one night. 

Void Walker - male 18-30. Master computer wizard and hacker. Any race. He is hip, fashion forward, with a twist go goth, boho, and steampunk. He is constantly seeking out things on the Dark Web, and likes to mainly keep to himself.

Pandora - female, 18-50. Any race. Gothy, witchy type that delves into all things in the spirit world. Mystery intrigues her, and she loves to watch true crime shows and figure out what the killer did wrong, then formulates the perfect crime. 

Dr. Helena Mortis - female 45-60. Any Race, an expert in ancient religions, demonology, and occult history who becomes obsessed with the legends surrounding Judas. She is also very inquisitive, and has the need to solve past and present mysteries. 

Ravenna Blackthorne - female, 18-50, any race. She is very dark and gothic. She has a fascination with spirits and trying to communicate with them. She feels that she can learn the truth from the dead. 

Sterling - Male, older gentleman who is very well kept, and very distinguished looking. He is the leader of an ancient old cult. He is involved with many different high profile people, and they all have one goal in mind. 

Girl #1 10-25, will be a victim - but will survive

Girl #2 10-25, will be a victim - but will survive

Guard #1 male, 20-50

Guard #2 Female, 20-50

I will also need 6 people to play special forces soldiers. 18-50, any race. 

soldier #1 

Soldier #2

Soldier #3 

Soldier #4

Soldier #5

Soldier #6

Butler - male or female. 30-70, any race. They will be the personal assistant to Sterling. 

I need 3 people to play human traffickers. Male or female. 21-45, any race.

Human trafficker #1

Human Trafficker #2

Human Trafficker #3

Draven - Male, any race 35-55. This guy is a real scumbag. He is involved in human trafficking, drugs, and various other nefarious acts.

If you know of anyone who would be interested in this film, cast or crew, please send them to join this page. ALL information and updated will be done through this page.

If you would rather email me, my email is Casting@cellar13films.com

I implore you to hit the link below and join the FB page dedicated to the film. You don't have to, I am merely suggesting to do so, because I do updates daily on that page.

https://www.facebook.com/groups/25775810025415886

FINAL CALL FOR PARTICIPANTS

CONTEMPORARY COMMEDIA DELL’ARTE
INTERNATIONAL SUMMER INTENSIVE

Italy • 13–25 July 2026

An intensive 11-day training focused on:

• Physical and dynamic body work
• Mask technique
• Character construction
• Improvisation structures
• Creation of scenes and performance material

For actors, directors, clowns, theatre-makers, educators and motivated performing arts students.

✔ International group
✔ Working language: English
✔ Maximum 8 participants
✔ Low-cost accommodation options available

The group is currently being finalized.

For full information and registration:
teatrostudiomaschera@gmail.com

www.fabriziopaladin.com

items.text: Hi everyone! We have a film about how busy and exhausting working and dating in London is. It will be a short of about ten minutes. We would need a leading man. The filming would take place over 2 or 3 days most likely in July in central London as well as another area to be determined, as we need a couple of indoor locations. Travel expenses and meals would be offered/compensated. If anyone is interested please DM me!

CASTING CALL: JESSICA — Supernatural Horror Feature Film

Non-Union
Rate: $200/day
Shooting location: Winnipeg, MB
Shoot dates: July 2026

Roles:
Susie — Lead · Female · 27–33
Jacob — Lead · Male · must read as 7
Jessica — Lead · Female · must read as 7
Olivia — Supporting · Female · must read as 7
Ken — Supporting · Male · late 50s–mid 60s — CAST
David — Supporting · Male · mid-30s — CAST

The roles of Ken and David have been cast. Please do not apply for those roles.

Role Commitments:
Susie — 12 shoot days
Jacob — 12 shoot days
Jessica — 8 shoot days
Olivia — 2 shoot days

Submission deadline: June 17, 2026

Submit a recent headshot, resume, and reel if available.

Apply here:
jessicahorrorfilm.com

Please do not send Facebook messages. Use the contact information on the website.

**CASTING CALL – Ulønnet kortfilm (Thriller)**
Vi søger to kvindelige skuespillere til en fiktiv thriller -kortfilm med titlen *“En dag i maj”*. Optagelserne forventes at foregå i 2 dage i af slutningen af juli eller begyndelse af august.

**Vi søger:**

* En birolle (ca. 20/ 25 år)

Af danske udseende. (Lyshåret)

* En kvindelige hovedrolle( ca.35/ 40 år) sydlandsk / brunette udseende (mørkt hår, brune øjne, / blå øjne )

Historien  hanlder om en stils fotograf, der en dag i en park imens er han er færd med at tage nogle billeder overvære et mord. 

**Praktisk info:**

** locations i en park København 

* Projektet er ulønnet

Kortfilmen er independant af en erfarne instruktør 

* 

Interesserede og seriøse ansøgere kan kontakte:

📧 amirrezazadeh104@gmail.com 

Med venlig hilsen

Amir

items.text:
PROFIT SHARE
# **Audition notice: Underneath the Lintel**

Show dates: 20-24 October 2026

Show venue: Nottingham Arts Theatre (studio)

Audition date: 11 July 2026, 1-4 pm (you will not need to be present for the full time and will be assigned a timeslot).

Audition venue: Lace Market Theatre, Nottingham

Karuna Productions invites auditionees for *Underneath the Lintel,* a one-woman show about obsession, loneliness and the search for belonging. When a middle-aged librarian uncovers evidence that a mythical figure dating back to mediaeval times may actually exist, she embarks on an improbable, absurd quest. It will take her across the world and face to face with life’s biggest questions – and finally to a small theatre in Nottingham to share her story…
# Parts

**The Librarian **(F, 40s-50s). Dutch (accent negotiable. Support will be available as needed on pronunciation of a few Dutch words – the director is a Dutch speaker). Eccentric, single-minded, a loner, somewhat scatty. She may initially appear ordinary, even forgettable, but a great deal lurks beneath. Requires a skilled actor with excellent comic instincts, who can command an audience’s attention while convincing as someone with limited social skills and an acute interest in minutiae.

# **About the production**

The run time of the show is about 1 hour. Rehearsals will take place in Nottingham, scheduled according to the availability of actor and director. This is a profit-share production.

# **About the company**

Karuna Productions is a new theatre company based in Nottingham.

**Director: **Chris Sims. Chris is a Nottingham-based director and graduate of the Bristol Old Vic Theatre School. Examples of his work can be found at [www.chrissimsdirecting.co.uk](https://www.chrissimsdirecting.co.uk/).

**Producer:** Laurie Owen. Laurie is a Nottingham-based independent producer who works across theatre and comedy.

For more information or to register for an audition slot, please email Chris on [kitsims@gmail.com](mailto:kitsims@gmail.com)

items.text:
🎙️ A Message from Aileen Mythen about our upcoming ONLINE Voiceover Class...
We are absolutely thrilled to announce that the incredible Aileen Mythen will be joining our Introduction to Professional Voiceover Online Class this July. @aileenmythen

If you've ever dreamed of working in animation, gaming, commercials or audiobooks, this is an opportunity to learn from one of Ireland's most accomplished voice performers.

With more than 20 years of professional experience, Aileen has built an extraordinary career across voiceover, television, theatre and singing. Her animation credits include work with Disney, Warner Bros. and Brown Bag Films, while her gaming performances feature titles such as Genshin Impact, Arknights, Marvel Cosmic Invasion, The Talos Principle 2 and many more.

Her voice has also been trusted by major brands including Lidl, Mercedes, Barry's Tea, Centra, Zurich Insurance and Irish Ferries, alongside a huge range of commercial campaigns.

Most recently, Aileen completed narration on the new audiobook Our Deadly Summer, written by Emer McLysaght and Sarah Breen and published by Bloomsbury.

This special online session takes place on July 31st and is designed to give aspiring voice actors a genuine insight into the professional industry from someone who lives and breathes it every day.

Whether your passion is animation, gaming, commercials or audiobooks, this is a class you won't want to miss.

🎙️ Book your place now: (Link in bio also) https://pbl-dmd-events.indiestand.com/products/online-introduction-to-voiceover-class-with-pbl-voiceover-coach

#VoiceOver #VoiceActing #Animation #Gaming #IrishVoiceActor Audiobooks PBLVoiceover VoiceoverTraining Acting Performance GenshinImpact GameVoiceActor

items.text: Hey guys! Is there any good agencies near lincoln and surrounding areas for a 16yo? I have a lead role credit and training from pqa as well as being enrolled in mark jermins upcoming term :)
items.title: From the ActingUK community on Reddit: Mark jermin under fire for fake castings & false promises

topComments.text:
Hi the location of an agency is irrelevant so don't limit yourself... Apply to agencies which have both adult and child divisions as you will start as a Young Performer and get Spotlight automatically but will transition soon to adults... Your parent needs to apply for you as you are under 18... If they join Children's Acting, Modelling, Casting Calls & FREE Advice for Parents UK that has lots of advice and a list of reputable agencies in featured posts
.. you may wish to look at Aston Management 
And Brill and Rebecca Middleton for starters... Good luck!
Do take a look at this https://www.reddit.com/r/ActingUK/comments/1tjwwee/mark_jermin_under_fire_for_fake_castings_false/

items.text:
✨ CASTING CALL – A PLACE NOT MINE ✨

💫 *"There must be a place where my heart isn't a burden."*

🎭 We are excited to announce casting for **A Place Not Mine**, an original fantasy musical about belonging, love, loss, and the things in life we cannot always avoid.

📍 Rehearsals: Middlesex University, London
🎟️ Performances: The Drayton Arms Theatre
📅 29 & 30 November 2026

💛 This is an independent, unpaid production. Should funding become available, any profits will be shared among the cast and creative team.

🌟 We are currently seeking performers aged **18–30** *(35 for Sylas)*, as well as members of our creative team.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🎭 AVAILABLE ROLES

🖤 **RIVEN**
🎂 Playing age: 18–25
📖 Character reference: Riven (Winx Club)
🧠 Intelligent, withdrawn and emotionally guarded.

🎵 Audition song:
🎶 *Reflection* – Mulan

💖 **SERAPHINE**
🎂 Playing age: 18–25
📖 Character reference: Glinda (Wicked)
✨ Bright, bubbly and seemingly perfect.

🎵 Audition song:
🎶 *Once Upon a December* – Anastasia

☀️ **ORIS**
🎂 Playing age: 18–25
📖 Character reference: Olaf (Frozen)
😊 Loyal, optimistic and unintentionally funny.

🎵 Audition song:
🎶 *This Wish* – Wish

🖤 **SYLAS**
🎂 Playing age: 25–35
📖 Character reference: Severus Snape (Harry Potter)
📚 Strict, intelligent and intimidating.

🎵 Audition song:
🎶 *This Is The Thanks I Get?!* – Wish

🌲 **ROWAN**
🎂 Playing age: 18–25
📖 Character reference: Kristoff (Frozen)
😏 A sarcastic drama king who uses humour to survive awkward situations.

🎵 Audition song:
🎶 Any Disney song

⚡ **ELARA**
🎂 Playing age: 18–25
📖 Character reference: Jade West (Victorious)
🗣️ Sharp, intelligent and never afraid to speak her mind.

🎵 Audition song:
🎶 Any Disney song

🤍 **AURORA**
🎂 Playing age: 18–25
📖 Character reference: Mitchie Torres (Camp Rock)
🌷 Kind-hearted, supportive and emotionally open.

🎵 Audition song:
🎶 Any Disney song

🌙 **SELENE**
🎂 Playing age: 18–25
📖 Character reference: Barbie (Barbie 2023)
💞 Sweet, energetic and slightly chaotic.

🎵 Audition song:
🎶 Any Disney song

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

🎬 CREATIVE TEAM OPPORTUNITIES

We are also looking for:

🎭 DIRECTOR
✅ CHOREOGRAPHER – TAKEN
🎼 MUSICAL DIRECTOR

🎓 These positions are ideal for university students looking to expand their portfolio, gain practical experience, or complete placement requirements.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

📩 HOW TO APPLY

Send us a DM on our Instagram page:

📱 @a.place.not.mine

🎥 Actors should submit a self-tape performing the requested audition song.

🌟 Successful applicants will receive an invitation to an in-person audition.

💫 We look forward to hearing from you.

🏡 *Find a place that's yours.*

Casting Call for Left Out!

Left Out is a short-form comedy series.

Send us your headshot and demo (optional) if interested in playing any of these characters, and we will send sides. 

Accepting video submissions only. 

Email: leftout.series@gmail.com

Video Submission Deadline: June 17

Shooting Date: End of June TBD

Shooting Location: Downtown Toronto

items.text:
Paid casting call in Chicago searching for male actor and Child actors!
Thanks everyone! We are DePaul directing major MFA students, doing our master degree thesis short film. 

Please let me know if you are interested or know anyone! Paid. 

COMPENSATION : Paid / Stipend + Meals + Credit + Copy

SHOOT DATES: July 17-27,2026 (specific dates depend on role)

Email us: jessica.jin.post@gmail.com

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of macrame and text

May be an image of text that says 'CASTING CALL KNOTS SEEKING PIETRO Male, late 30s-mid 40s For a student thesis short fil Pietro is the father of Sebastian and Samuel. Tired, loving, and overwhelmed, he is trying to hold the family together on the day th leave for Italy. He is practical caring, but emotionally stretch thin. Looking for an actor with warmth, restraint, and a grounded presence. Shoot Dates: day between July 17-27 Location: Chicago area Compensation: Paid, stipend copy meals credit Submit headshot, resume, and self-tape to: jessica.jin.post@gmail.com'

May be an image of text that says 'CASTING CALL SEEKING: SEBASTIAN For Male, student thesis short film Sebastian. Quiet, guarded, and emotionally mature in some ways, but still very much child. On the day his family is leaving for Italy, he secretly sets out to visit his mother' grave before too late. He loves deeply, but he hides everything behind silence, distance, and anger. Looking for an actor who can carry emotion through stillness, looks, and small behavior. Shoot Dates: days between July 17-27 Location: area Compensation: Paid stipend +copy meals credit Submit headshot, resume, and self to: jessica.jin.post@gmail.com (For minors, submissions must come from parent/guardian.)'

items.previewTitle:
If you're interested, email us (see bio) with your CV and headshots!

Before It’s All Over is a new original comedy drama centring on four friends who, facing a number of issues ranging from dissertation deadlines, pushy parents, identity and self-destructive behaviour, learn that a meteorite is set to hit the Earth. Deciding to go out with a figurative bang before the literal one, they decide to finish out their lives with a final party.

items.text: Casting call!!

sharedPost.text:
🌟 REGALLY ROYAL PARTIES 🌟

CASTING CALL – 
CHILDREN’S ENTERTAINERS Southport , Liverpool , Preston!! 

Do you love performing, bringing characters to life, and creating magical memories for children? We are looking for enthusiastic performers to join our growing team!

We’re looking for people who are:

✨ Confident and outgoing
✨ Reliable and professional
✨ Great with children and families
✨ Energetic and enthusiastic
✨ Strong performers (acting, singing, dancing, or character work is a bonus)
✨ Able to work weekends and school holidays
✨ Team players with a positive attitude
✨ Passionate about making children’s dreams come true

📅 AUDITION DATES
25th June
26th June

What we offer:

👑 Competitive pay
👑 Exciting performance opportunities
👑 Flexible work! You set your schedule
👑 Ongoing training and support
👑 A fun and rewarding working environment

Join the magic and become part of the Regally Royal Parties family!

📲 To apply, send us a message on WhatsApp: 07889 288335

📧 Or email us: regallyroyalparties@yahoo.com

Regally Royal Parties

Creating magical memories, one celebration at a time. ✨👑

items.summary: Casting call!!
items.title: Casting call!!

items.text:
URGENT CASTING CALL: MISS LONELYHEART'S MEMORY LIGHT - DENVER BASED FEATURE FILM!

Hello, my name is Rowan Harper and I am a recent graduate of CU Denver's Film and Television department. I am producing a feature film for a local filmmaker and we are looking for a wide variety of strong roles! All details below 👇

Longline: An 8-year-old girl with PTSD runs away from a foster home to confront her violent, deadbeat dad, and to piece together the fractured memory of her mother’s death.

Roles: 

Kid (A.K.A Grace) - Lead, Female, All Ethnicities, Age 6 - 12: A resilient and insightful child navigating the trauma of her mother’s death. She is described as being "wise beyond her years" with a premature sadness that defines her character. Kid suffers from undiagnosed PTSD, which manifests physically through stress-induced incontinence. Her primary companions are eight Tamagotchi virtual pets that she tends to as emotional lifelines.

Miss. Lonelyheart (Nonie Corazon) - Lead, Female, Hispanic/Latino, Age 60 - 90: An eccentric, unkempt recluse living in a decaying apartment building. She was displaced from Denver’s Auraria neighborhood during the 1970s Urban Renewal Program, a history that colors her reclusive nature. She is the owner of the "memory light," a magical analog device she uses to revisit her past.

Johnny Taylor - Supporting, Male, All Ethnicities, Age 40 - 60: Kid’s estranged father, recently out on parole and living in a dismal apartment. He is a Gulf War veteran (Operation Desert Storm) whose combat-induced PTSD contributes to a "vacant, mean meekness" and history of explosive violence. While he loves his daughter, he is "hollowed out" by instability and unable to provide the care she needs.

Wanda Howell - Supporting, Female, All Ethnicities, Age 20 - 50: Johnny’s girlfriend. She is a tough, chain-smoker with an "edgy energy" who wears cheap polyester clothing. Despite her flawed exterior, she is "unexpectedly kind" and serves as a vital anchor for Kid during moments of emotional free fall.

Samantha Dander - Supporting, Female, All Ethnicities, Age 20 - 35: A mousy and soft-spoken social worker who lives in the same building as Nonie. She is perennially dateless and lives in a dimly lit apartment filled with cats. She is an observant neighbor who becomes a hesitant witness to Kid's journey.

Otis - Supporting, Male, All Ethnicities, Age 60 - 80: A homeless blues guitarist who lives in a cardboard box outside Nonie’s building. Despite his living situation, he is remarkably clean and wears a white suit. He is observant and protective of his neighbors, often serving as a rhythmic "chorus" for the building’s activities - MUST BE PROFICIENT AT GUITAR 

Bruno - Supporting, Male, All Ethnicities, Age 40 - 60: The stubby superintendent and doorman of the apartment building. He is described as a "lazy, unpleasant package" who frequently clashes with Otis over property boundaries. Despite his aggressive demeanor, he is highly sensitive regarding his mother and struggles with his own feelings of isolation.

We are also looking for a smattering of bit parts, day players, ensemble and chorus roles. Please lease please consider those too. Email rowanharper386@gmail.com for any applications or questions. We are shooting July 13th - August 8th in Denver and Arvada Colorado. We will be flexible with your schedule. Payment is $1800 to be split between all cast. This project is non-union.

topComments.text: I'm interested in Wanda role, but when is the filming and how many days?
Hello I am interested and know someone who is also interested. I will send info! ❤️
